bookSourceComment:
更新日志请点击登录，更新书源中查看

基础使用教程：
1、搜索：
    1)基础搜索：在发现页长按该书源，点击搜索，直接搜，搜索范围(全部来源小说)
    2)进阶搜索：在登陆-书源设置中选择指定模式/来源，可搜索指定模式/来源内容
    3)快捷搜索：使用特殊关键词(x,t,m,d,@)搜索
         x:书名@来源  如(x:十日终焉@番茄)
         t:书名@来源  如(t:十日终焉@番茄)
         m:书名@来源  如(m:十日终焉@番茄)
         d:书名@来源  如(d:十日终焉@番茄)
         其中：x表示小说(可省略)，t表示听书，m表示漫画，d表示短剧
         冒号支持中文英文
         
2、发现页：
    在书源设置中选择指定模式或者单个来源，然后刷新发现页即可
    
3、更多使用方式长按发现页书源选择登录一目了然
4、用户后台有视频教程
exploreUrl:
<js>
var open_argument = source.getVariable();
if (!open_argument || open_argument == '') {
    var initData = {
        tab: "小说",
        tone_id: "默认音色",
        server: host[0],
        sources: "番茄",
        source_type: "男频",
        find_source: "番茄",
        find_tab: "小说",
        fqpara: "on"
    };
    source.setVariable(JSON.stringify(initData));
    open_argument = source.getVariable();
}
var base_url = getArguments(open_argument, 'server') || host[0];
var ms = getArguments(open_argument, 'tone_id') || '';
var source_type = getArguments(open_argument, 'source_type') || '男频';
var tab = getArguments(open_argument, 'find_tab') || getArguments(open_argument, 'tab') || '小说';
var sources =  getArguments(open_argument, 'sources') || '番茄';
var fxyjr = getArguments(open_argument, 'fxyjr');


function checkEnv() {
    let isModified = false;
    try {
        new Packages.io.legato.kazusa.utils.TimeoutCancellationException('');
        isModified = true;
    } catch (e) {
        isModified = typeof source.loginUi == 'function' ? false : true;
    }

    return isModified;
}

var islyc = checkEnv();
let device_type = '安卓';
try {
	  try {
	  java.qread();
	  device_type ="轻阅读";
	  } catch {
	  	java.deviceID();
    device_type = "苹果";
	  	}
    
} catch (e) {
    try {
        java.androidId();
        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

if (((islyc&&device_type!='苹果') || device_type=='轻阅读') && fxyjr != "on"){
	sources = getArguments(open_argument, 'find_source') || sources;
	setArguments('find_source', sources);
	}
var sdtoken;
try {
    var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
    sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
} catch (e) {
    sdtoken = '';
}

var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
var fqssionid = '';
if (!fqcookie && (sources == '番茄' || sources == '全部')) {
    java.toast('您还未登陆番茄账号，无法同步数据哦！');
} else {
    fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
}
var fqsjurl = base_url + "/bookshelf?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqtjurl = base_url + "/fqrecommend?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqlsurl = base_url + "/fqhistory?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;

var groupDatas = [];
var infoData = [ ];
if (sources == '番茄' || sources == '全部') {
infoData = [{
        "title": "登录番茄",
        "url": '{\{java.startBrowser("https://fanqienovel.com/","番茄登录");}}',
        "style": {
            "layout_flexGrow": 1,
            "layout_flexBasisPercent": 0.45
        }
    }];
}

var hasValidCookie = fqcookie.length > 0;

if (hasValidCookie && (sources == '番茄' || sources == '全部')) {
    function groupQuery() {
        try {
            var url = base_url + "/group_name?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
            var res = java.ajax(url);
            var response = JSON.parse(res);

            if (!(response && response.data)) {}

            response.data.forEach(function(group) {
                var keys = Object.keys(group);
                if (keys.length > 0) {
                    var key = keys[0];
                    var value = group[key];
                    if (value && value.length) {
                        var option = {
                            "method": "POST",
                            "body": {
                                "book_ids": value,
                                "page": "{{page}}"
                            }
                        };
                        groupDatas.push({
                            title: key,
                            url: base_url + "/bookshelf," + JSON.stringify(option),
                            style: {
                                layout_flexGrow: 1,
                                layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }
            });

            if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    title: "--",
                    url: "",
                    style: {
                        layout_flexGrow: 1,
                        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                    }
                });
            }
        } catch (e) {
            java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架" + fqssionid);
        }
    }

    try {
        java.longToast("正在加载分组数据...");
        var userUrl = base_url + "/fquser?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
        var userRes = java.ajax(userUrl);
        var userData = JSON.parse(userRes);

        var userName = (userData && userData.data && userData.data.name) ? userData.data.name : '未知用户';
        if (!userName.includes('未知用户')) {
            infoData = [{
                title: "番茄个人中心",
                url: fqsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "个性推荐(番茄)",
                url: fqtjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "历史阅读(番茄)",
                url: fqlsurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }];
        }
        groupQuery();
    } catch (e) {
        java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架");
    }
}

var style_list = [];
try {
    var durl = `${base_url}/discovestyle?source=${sources}&source_type=${source_type}&tab=${tab}`;
    var res = java.ajax(durl);
    var result = JSON.parse(res);
    style_list = result.data || [];
    if (result.msg) {
        java.toast(result.msg);
    }
} catch (e) {
    java.toast("发现样式获取失败");
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
//let qtcookie = ""
let qtop = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};



qtop = JSON.stringify(qtop);
let qtsjurl = base_url + '/get_book_shelf,' + qtop;

let qtsj = [];

if (((islyc&&device_type!='苹果') || device_type=='轻阅读') && fxyjr !="on") {
    try {
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "线路",
            host,
            base_url,
            "server",
            1
        ));
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "模式",
            ["小说", "听书", "短剧", "漫画"],
            tab,
            "find_tab",
            0.33
        ));
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "频道",
            ["男频", "女频"],
            source_type,
            "source_type",
            0.33
        ));
        let source_list = ['番茄', '七猫', '书旗', '塔读', '江湖', '小米', '米读', 'QQ阅读', '酷我小说','幻梦轻小说', '西瓜小说', '69书吧', '顶点', '爱下电子书', '伪69', '超会专属小说', '3A小说', '阅友小说', '笔趣阁22', '追更人', '久久小说', '52书库', '腐小说', '完本小说', '盐选文库', '有度中文', '三零读书', '鹿鹿', '星空小说', '365小说', '冷冷文学', '万相书城', '独步小说', '福书网', '速读谷', '全本同人'];
        if (tab == '听书') {
            source_list = ['番茄', '七猫', '喜马拉雅', '酷我'];
        }
        if (tab == '漫画') {
            source_list = ['全免漫画', '番茄', '包子漫画', '漫画屋', '漫画网', '漫客栈', '漫画屋'];
        }
        if (tab == '短剧') {
            source_list = ['番茄', '七猫', '河马短剧', '旺旺短剧', '极速影视'];
        }
        qtsj.push(createFilter(
            "平台",
            source_list,
            sources,
            "find_source",
            1
        ));
       const excludeTitles = ['点击登录可切换来源', '切换后长按刷新即可'];
       style_list = style_list.filter(item => !excludeTitles.includes(item.title));
    } catch {}
} else {
	if (device_type == '安卓'){
	qtsj.push({
        "title": "下载阅读Sigma最新测试版",
        "url": '{\{java.longToast("本书源推荐使用最新版洛娅橙改版阅读Σ\\n请安装后重新导入书源");java.startBrowser("https://legado.langge.cf","下载阅读Sigma最新测试版");}}',
        "style": {
            "layout_flexGrow": 1,
            "layout_flexBasisPercent": 1
        }
    })}
	}

if (qtcookie) {
qtsj.push({
    title: "大灰狼个人中心",
    url: qtsjurl,
    style: {
        layout_flexGrow: 1,
        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
    }
})
} else {
qtsj.push({
    title: "登录大灰狼书源",
    url: `{\{java.startBrowser("${base_url}/login","登录书源");}}`,
    style: {
        layout_flexGrow: 1,
        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
    }
})
}


var finalData = infoData.concat(groupDatas, style_list);
finalData = qtsj.concat(finalData);
JSON.stringify(finalData);
</js>

if (String(baseUrl).startsWith("data:")) {

    if (url != "" && proxy == "本地") {

            let ck69 = String(cookie.getCookie('https://www.69shuba.com'));
            let headers = {
        	 "Referer": url,
            "Cookie": ck69,
            "User-Agent":  java.getWebViewUA()
             };            
             let op = JSON.stringify({
                "headers": headers
            });
            html = java.ajax(`${url},${op}`);
        } else {
            html = java.ajax(url);
        }
        //java.log(html);
        if (html.includes("Just a moment...") && sources == '69书吧') {
            cookie.removeCookie('https://www.69shuba.com');
            java.longToast('需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证');
            html = java.startBrowserAwait(url, "需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证").body();

             java.log(html);
        }
    }
    let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
    let op = {
        method: "POST",
        body: {
            html: html
        }
    };
    op = JSON.stringify(op);
    let varia = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
    if (varia == 'null') {
        varia = '';
    }
    varia = JSON.stringify({
        'custom': varia
    });
    //varia = java.base64Encode(varia);
    java.log(`${base_url}/detail?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);
    try {
        result = java.ajax(`${base_url}/detail?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);
        JSON.parse(result);
    } catch(_err) {
        for (var _i = 0; _i < host.length; _i++) {
            if (host[_i] === base_url) continue;
            try {
                result = java.ajax(`${host[_i]}/detail?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);
                JSON.parse(result);
                setArguments("server", host[_i]);
                java.longToast("\n\n线路故障，已自动切换到：" + host[_i]);
                break;
            } catch(_e2) { continue; }
        }
    }
}

ruleBookInfo.intro:
<js>
let {
    book_id,
    source: sources,
    tab,
    book_tts,
    tags,
    role,
    last_chapter_title,
    last_chapter_update_time,
    word_number,
    status,
    score,
    abstract,
    copyright_info
} = result;
let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
if (proxy == "本地") {
    proxy = "本地网络";
} else {
    proxy = "服务器网络";
}
java.put("book_detail", JSON.stringify(result));
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
let key3 = "";
try {
    let cookieValue =
        String(cookie.getCookie(base_url)) || String(java.getCookie(base_url));
    key3 = getKey(cookieValue);
} catch (e) {
    key3 = "";
}

if (key3 == "") {
    java.log("当前服务器未查询到登录状态，尝试查询其他服务器登录状态...");
    let cookieValue;
    for (let h of host) {
        try {
            cookieValue = String(cookie.getCookie(h)) || String(java.getCookie(h));
            key3 = getKey(cookieValue);
        } catch (e) {
            key3 = "";
        }
        if (key3) {
            java.log(`已在${h}登录，退出查询，正在转移登录状态到当前服务${base_url}`);
            //java.log(cookieValue)
            cookie.removeCookie(h);
            cookie.removeCookie(base_url);
            cookie.setCookie(base_url, cookieValue);
            break;
        }
    }
}

if (book.readConfig == null || book.readConfig.useReplaceRule == null) {
    book.setUseReplaceRule(false);
}

let nickname = '账号状态：⚠️ 未登录 | 点击右上角 🔖 登录';
try {
    let opcx = {
        method: "GET",
        headers: {
            cookie: 'qttoken=' + key3 + ';'
        },
    };
    opcx = JSON.stringify(opcx);
    let user_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(base_url + '/get_avatar,' + opcx));
    if (user_info.code == 0) {
        if (user_info.nickname) {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.nickname
        } else {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.email + "(请前往用户后台设置用户名)"
        }
    }
} catch (e) {
    if (key) {
        nickname = '账号状态：已登录'
    }
};

let loginStatus = nickname;

let lightDivider = "❇️───────❇️───────❇️";
let heavyDivider = "‎\n‎";

let isValid = (value) => String(value).length > 1;
let ctitle = book.durChapterTitle || '未开始';
let info = `
    📡 当前服务：${base_url}
    🔑 ${loginStatus}
    🏷 数据来源：${sources}
    🔄 当前模式：${tab}
    ⚙️ 访问模式：${proxy}
    📖 阅读至：${ctitle}
`;

if (tab == "听书") {
    //let toneId = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "tone_id");
    let toneId = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
    if (toneId == '') {
    	toneId= '4';
    	}
    if (isValid(book_tts)) {
        info += `${lightDivider}
    🎵 音色配置：${toneId}
    ✨ AI音色请点击右上角书籍变量填写相关值，真人听书请重新搜索选择带有主播的书籍
    ${book_tts}
`;
    }
}

let basicInfo = "";
let addBasicInfo = (value, prefix, icon) => {
    if (isValid(value)) basicInfo += `    ${icon} ${prefix} ${value}\n`;
};

addBasicInfo(tags, "书籍分类：", "🌈");
addBasicInfo(role, "书籍主角：", "👑");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");

if (basicInfo) info += `${lightDivider}\n${basicInfo}`;

if (isValid(abstract)) {
    let indentedAbstract = abstract
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
        .join("\n");
    info += `${heavyDivider}
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
} else {
    info += `${heavyDivider}`;
}

if (isValid(copyright_info)) {
    info += `${lightDivider}
    © ${copyright_info}
`;
} else {
    info += `${lightDivider}`;
}

info += `
${heavyDivider}
    💠💠💠 数据更新于 ${new Date().toLocaleString()} 💠💠💠
`;
let jjinfo = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "info");

if (jjinfo != "off") {
    info = String(info)
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => line.replace(/^ {4}/, ""))
        .join("\n");
} else {
    basicInfo = "";
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
    addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
    addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
    addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");
    if (isValid(abstract)) {
        let indentedAbstract = abstract
            .split("\n")
            .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
            .join("\n");
        basicInfo += `
    \n‎
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
    } else {
        basicInfo += `${heavyDivider}`;
    }
    info = `‎\n🏷 数据来源：${sources}\n` + basicInfo;
}
</js>

        .replace("source", "sources")

        .map((query) => query.split("="))
    );

}

if (url != "" && proxy == "本地") {
    if (sources == '69书吧') {
        let ck69 = String(cookie.getCookie('https://www.69shuba.com'));
        let headers = {
        	 "Referer": url,
            "Cookie": ck69,
            "User-Agent":  java.getWebViewUA()
             };
        let op = JSON.stringify({
            "headers": headers
        });
        html = java.ajax(`${url},${op}`);    
    } else {
        html = java.ajax(url);
    }
    //java.log(html);
    if (html.includes("Just a moment...") && sources == '69书吧') {
        cookie.removeCookie('https://www.69shuba.com');
        java.longToast('需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证');
        html = java.startBrowserAwait(url, "需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证").body();

           java.log(html);
    }
};
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
let op = {
    method: "POST",
    body: {
        html: html
    }
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
let varia = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
if (varia == 'null') {
    varia = '';
}
varia = JSON.stringify({
    'custom': varia
});
// varia = java.base64Encode(varia);
//java.log(`${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);
let data = java.ajax(
    `${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`
);
let device, device_type;
try {
    device = java.deviceID();
    device_type = "苹果";
} catch (e) {
    try {
        device = java.androidId();
        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device = "";
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

if (tab == "小说") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
} else if (tab == "听书") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 32;
    } else {
        book.type = 1;
    }
} else if (tab == "漫画") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 64;
    } else {
        book.type = 2;
    }
} else if (tab == "短剧") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 3;
    }
} else {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let reading = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "reading");

if (book && book.order != 0 && reading == '1') {
    try {
        if (!data || !book.variable || !base_url || !qtcookie) {
            java.log('缺少必要参数');
        } else {
            let parsedData;
            try {
                parsedData = JSON.parse(data);
            } catch (e) {
                java.log('解析data数据失败:' + e);
            }
            
            if (parsedData && parsedData.data && Array.isArray(parsedData.data) && parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex]) {
                let ritem = parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex];
                let bookInfoObj;
                try {
                    bookInfoObj = JSON.parse(book.variable);
                } catch (e) {
                    java.log('解析book.variable失败:' + e);
                }
                
                if (bookInfoObj) {
                    let book_info;
                    try {
                        book_info = JSON.parse(bookInfoObj.book_detail || JSON.stringify(bookInfoObj));
                    } catch (e) {
                        java.log('解析book_detail失败:' + e);
                    }
                    
                    if (book_info && typeof book_info === 'object') {
                        let rurl = base_url + '/add_book_to_book_shelf,';
                        book_info['read_status'] = 1;
                        book_info['last_chapter_item_id'] = ritem.item_id || '';
                        book_info['last_chapter_title'] = ritem.title || '';
                        let rop = {
                            method: "POST",
                            headers: {
                                cookie: qtcookie
                            },
                            body: book_info
                        };
                        let check_book_url = base_url + '/check_book_in_book_shelf,';
                        let checkResponse;
                        
                        try {
                            checkResponse = java.ajax(check_book_url + JSON.stringify(rop));
                        } catch (e) {
                            java.log('检查书籍请求失败:' + e);
                        }
                        
                        if (checkResponse) {
                            let check_data;
                            try {
                                check_data = JSON.parse(checkResponse).data;
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('解析检查响应失败:' + e);
                            }
                            try {
                                if (check_data && check_data.id) {
                                    book_info['id'] = check_data.id;
                                    let uurl = base_url + '/update_book_shelf,';
                                    java.ajax(uurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                } else {
                                    java.ajax(rurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                }
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('书架操作失败:' + e);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    } catch (error) {
        java.log('书籍同步流程异常:' + error);
        java.longToast('\n同步阅读进度失败，但不影响阅读，可以前往登录关闭书架同步功能。');
    }
}
data;
</js>$.data

searchUrl:
<js>
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'server');
let media;
let sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'sources') || getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'source');
let disabled_sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'disabled_sources') || '0';
if (String(key).startsWith("m:") || String(key).startsWith("m：")) {
    media = "漫画"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("t:") || String(key).startsWith("t：")) {
    media = "听书"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("d:") || String(key).startsWith("d：")) {
    media = "短剧"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("x:") || String(key).startsWith("x：")) {
    media = "小说"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else {
    media = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'tab') || getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'media');
}
if (key.includes('@')) {
    var parts = key.split('@');
    key = parts[0];
    sources = parts[1] || sources;
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let op = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
`${base_url}/search?title=${key}&tab=${media}&source=${sources}&page={{page}}&disabled_sources=${disabled_sources},${op}`
</js>

ruleBookInfo.downloadUrls:
<js>
if(baseUrl.indexOf('read')>-1){
	url = book.origin + '/' +java.getString("@@.readcontent@a@href")
	html = java.ajax(url)
	result = html.match(/var downloadurl = "([\s\S]+?)";/)[1]
}else{
	url = baseUrl.replace(/.*-(\d+).*/, "https://www.527txt.com/txt-xx/softdownfree.asp?softid=$1&ckm=mianfei")
	html = java.ajax(url)
	java.setContent(html)
	result = java.getString("@@text.第一下载地址(首选)@href")
}
</js>

bookSourceComment:
2026.2.3日更新：
未登录状态下将禁止搜索
🚫版本为必要更新，否则后续会无法搜索


❤️‍🔥登录必看❤️‍🔥
1.输入邮箱密码后必须点✓保存生效，
否则读取不到输入的账号密码
2.跳转卡顿在设置→其他设置中清除WebView缓存

🔔适配兼容
IOS仅适配源阅

🔥注：阅读请使用最新测试版
1.所有源站每20秒最多12章，把预下载调到0-3之间使用
💯[打赏VIP无请求限制,专属书源]
2.自定义源站示例：番茄小说,七猫小说  多个源站用英文,号分隔
源站名参考 登录URL //书源配置列表 v参数
3.源站带有❇️图标表示只能指定或@搜索

4.搜索模式：
书名@来源 多个来源用英文,号分隔
示例： 
系统@番茄小说，多个源站使用英文,号分隔
书名@类型 返回对应类型所有源站数据，可直接使用@方式搜索或者点击登陆切换模式
示例： 
系统@小说  听书  漫画  短剧等
默认书名排序
指定作者优先：
作者名@作者   作者名@作者,源站
exploreUrl:
<js>
let config = (() => {
    try {
        let cfg = JSON.parse(source.getVariable())[0] || {};
        if (!cfg.host || !cfg.gender) {
            cfg = {gender: "boy", host: getServerHost()};
            source.setVariable(JSON.stringify([cfg]));
            java.toast("配置初始化完成");
        }
        return cfg;
    } catch(e) {
        let cfg = {gender: "boy", host: getServerHost()};
        source.setVariable(JSON.stringify([cfg]));
        return cfg;
    }
})();
    
let rawVariable = source.getVariable();
let 个人中心 = 1;
let obj = (title, url, type) => ({
  title: title,
  url: url,
  style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: type }
});

let sort = [];
let push = (title, url, type) => sort.push(obj(title, url, type));

let currentType = "";
let currentSource = "";
try {
  let vArray = JSON.parse(rawVariable);
  if (vArray.length > 0) {
    let v = vArray[0];
    currentType = v.gender || "";
    currentSource = v.source || "";
  }
} catch(e) {
  currentType = "";
  currentSource = "";
}

const getGenderDisplayName = (gender) => {
  if (gender == "boy") return "男频";
  if (gender == "girl") return "女频";
  return "";
};

const genderDisplay = getGenderDisplayName(currentType);

push(`当前为【${currentSource || "番茄小说"}】${genderDisplay ? `【${genderDisplay}】` : ''}`, "", 1);

if (currentSource == "晋江") {
	   sort.push({
        title: "📝点击签到",
        url: `${getServerHost()}/jj_signin`,
        style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
    });
    
    sort.push({
        title: "📂我的收藏",
        url: `${getServerHost()}/jjbookshelf?token=`,
        style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
    });
}

const excludedSources = ["小说", "听书", "漫画", "视频", "短剧", "音频","番茄小说"];

if (currentSource && !excludedSources.includes(currentSource)) {
  try {
    let apiUrl = `${getServerHost()}/type_api?source=${currentSource}`;
    if (currentType) {
      apiUrl += `&gender=${currentType}`;
    }
    
    let response = JSON.parse(java.ajax(apiUrl));
    
    if (response.data && response.data.found) {
      response.data.found.forEach(item => {
        let finalUrl = "";
        if (item.url) {
          finalUrl = `${getServerHost()}/type_api?source=${currentSource}&page={{page}}&url=${item.url}`;
          if (currentType) {
            finalUrl += `&gender=${currentType}`;
          }
        }
        sort.push({
          title: item.title,
          url: finalUrl,
          style: item.style || { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
        });
      });
    } else {
      push(`【${currentSource}】${genderDisplay ? `【${genderDisplay}】` : ''}暂无数据`, "", 1);
    }
  } catch(e) {
    push(`【${currentSource}】${genderDisplay ? `【${genderDisplay}】` : ''}暂无数据`, "", 1);
  }
  JSON.stringify(sort);
} else {
  let recommendUrl = getServerHost() + "/read_recommend?session=" + getSessionId();
  push('个性推荐', recommendUrl, 0.29);
  push('巅峰榜单', 'https://fanqienovel.com/api/author/misc/top_book_list/v1/?limit=100&offset={{(page-1)*100}}', 0.29);
  push('出版榜单', 'https://fanqienovel.com/api/node/publication/list?page_index={{(page-1)*100}}&page_count=100', 0.29);
  push('爆更榜单', 'https://api-lf.fanqiesdk.com/api/novel/channel/homepage/rank/rank_list/v2/?aid=13&limit=50&offset={{(page-1)*100}}&side_type=15&type=1', 0.29);
  push('黑马榜单', 'https://api-lf.fanqiesdk.com/api/novel/channel/homepage/rank/rank_list/v2/?aid=13&limit=50&offset={{(page-1)*100}}&side_type=13&type=1', 0.29);
  push('热搜榜单', 'https://api-lf.fanqiesdk.com/api/novel/channel/homepage/rank/rank_list/v2/?aid=13&limit=50&offset={{(page-1)*100}}&side_type=12&type=1', 0.29);

  let showCategories = currentType == "girl" ? [0] : [1];
  
  showCategories.forEach(genderCode => {
    let isMale = genderCode == 1;
    let genderLabel = isMale ? "男频" : "女频";
    
    let categories = isMale ? [
      {id: 1141, name: "西方奇幻"},
      {id: 1140, name: "东方仙侠"},
      {id: 8, name: "科幻末世"},
      {id: 261, name: "都市日常"},
      {id: 124, name: "都市修真"},
      {id: 1014, name: "都市高武"},
      {id: 273, name: "历史古代"},
      {id: 27, name: "战神赘婿"},
      {id: 263, name: "都市种田"},
      {id: 258, name: "传统玄幻"},
      {id: 272, name: "历史脑洞"},
      {id: 539, name: "悬疑脑洞"},
      {id: 262, name: "都市脑洞"},
      {id: 257, name: "玄幻脑洞"},
      {id: 751, name: "悬疑灵异"},
      {id: 504, name: "抗战谍战"},
      {id: 746, name: "游戏体育"},
      {id: 718, name: "动漫衍生"},
      {id: 1016, name: "男频衍生"}
    ] : [
      {id: 1139, name: "古风世情"},
      {id: 8, name: "科幻末世"},
      {id: 746, name: "游戏体育"},
      {id: 1015, name: "女频衍生"},
      {id: 248, name: "玄幻言情"},
      {id: 23, name: "种田"},
      {id: 79, name: "年代"},
      {id: 267, name: "现言脑洞"},
      {id: 246, name: "宫斗宅斗"},
      {id: 539, name: "悬疑脑洞"},
      {id: 253, name: "古言脑洞"},
      {id: 24, name: "快穿"},
      {id: 749, name: "青春甜宠"},
      {id: 745, name: "星光璀璨"},
      {id: 747, name: "女频悬疑"},
      {id: 750, name: "职场婚恋"},
      {id: 748, name: "豪门总裁"},
      {id: 1017, name: "民国言情"}
    ];
    
    push(`❤️${genderLabel}阅读榜❤️`, "", 1);
    
    categories.forEach(cat => {
      sort.push({
        title: cat.name,
        url: `${getServerHost()}/style_top?rank_list_type=3&offset={{(page-1)*10}}&limit=10&category_id=${cat.id}&gender=${genderCode}&rankMold=2`,
        style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
      });
    });
    
    push(`❤️${genderLabel}新书榜❤️`, "", 1);
    
    categories.forEach(cat => {
      sort.push({
        title: cat.name,
        url: `${getServerHost()}/style_top?rank_list_type=3&offset={{(page-1)*10}}&limit=10&category_id=${cat.id}&gender=${genderCode}&rankMold=2`,
        style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
      });
    });
  });

  let fqCategoryArr = [];
  showCategories = currentType == "girl" ? [0] : [1];

  showCategories.forEach(i => {
    try {
      let response = JSON.parse(java.ajax(`${getServerHost()}/type_style?new_category_tab=${i}`));
      let $ = response.data.category_tab_data;
      
      let tabName = $.tab_name || (i == 0 ? "女频" : "男频");
      fqCategoryArr.push(obj(`❤️${tabName}分类❤️`, null, 1));
      
      $.cell_data.forEach(c => {
        fqCategoryArr.push(obj(c.cell_name, null, 1));
        
        if (c.atom_data && Array.isArray(c.atom_data)) {
          c.atom_data.slice(1).forEach(a => {
            let d = a.category_data;
            if (d && d.name) {
              let cid = d.category_id;

              let gender, genre_type;
              if (i == 0) {
                gender = 0;
                genre_type = 0;
              } else if (i == 1) {
                gender = 1;
                genre_type = 0;
              } else {
                gender = 1;
                genre_type = 0;
              }
              
              fqCategoryArr.push({
                title: d.name,
                url: `${getServerHost()}/type_style?category_id=${cid}&genre_type=${genre_type}&gender=${gender}&offset={{(page-1)*100}}&selected_items=`,
                style: {
                  layout_flexGrow: 1,
                  layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29
                }
              });
            }
          });
        }
      });
    } catch (e) {
      fqCategoryArr.push(obj("分类加载失败，请重试", null, 1));
    }
  });

  fqCategoryArr.forEach(item => {
    if (item.style && item.style.layout_flexBasisPercent) {
      push(item.title, item.url, item.style.layout_flexBasisPercent);
    } else {
      sort.push({
        title: item.title,
        url: item.url,
        style: {
          layout_flexGrow: 1,
          layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29
        }
      });
    }
  });

  let hasValidSession = false;
  let username = "";

  try {
    let uinfo = java.ajax(getServerHost() + "/book_user?session=" + getSessionId());
    uinfo = JSON.parse(uinfo);
    
    if (uinfo.data.name) {
      username = uinfo.data.name;
      hasValidSession = true;
    }
  } catch (e) {
  }

  if (!hasValidSession) {
    java.toast("番茄登录已过期，请重新登录");
  }

  let gro = [];
  let pushGro = (title, url, type) => gro.push(obj(title, url, type));

  let sArr = [];

  if (hasValidSession) {
    try {
      let book_shelf_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(getServerHost() + "/book_shelf?session=" + getSessionId()));

      if (book_shelf_info.code == 0) {
        个人中心 = 1;
        
        let groups_bookids = { "未分组": [] };
        book_shelf_info.data.book_shelf_info.forEach(i => {
          if (!groups_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"]) 
            groups_bookids[i.group_name] = [];
          groups_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"].push(i.book_id);
        });

        Object.keys(groups_bookids).forEach(k => {
          pushGro(k, "https://fanqienovel.com/fqbookshelf/groupName/" + k, 0.4);
        });
        if (Object.keys(groups_bookids).length % 2 != 0) pushGro("占位", "", 0.4);
        
        sArr.push(obj(username + '的个人中心', '', 1));
        sArr.push(obj("我的书架", "https://fanqienovel.com/fqbookshelf", 1));
        sArr = sArr.concat(gro);
        sArr.push(obj("阅读历史", getServerHost() + "/read_history?session=" + getSessionId() + "&page={{page}}", 1));
      } else {
        个人中心 = 0;
        java.toast("获取书架信息失败，登录可能已过期");
      }
    } catch (e) {
      个人中心 = 0;
      java.toast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏个人中心");
    }
  } else {
    个人中心 = 0;
    java.toast("您还未登录番茄账号，无法同步数据");
  }

  sort = sArr.concat(sort);
  JSON.stringify(sort);
}
</js>

ruleExplore.author: $.author
ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
function getBookIdFull(url) {
    const {java} = this;
    let $ = JSON.parse(url).data;
    let arr = [];
    if ($.book_shelf_info && $.book_shelf_info.length > 0) {
        arr = $.book_shelf_info.map(item => item.book_id);
    } else if ($.data_list && $.data_list.length > 0) {
        arr = $.data_list.map(item => item.book_id_str);
    } else {
        java.toast("获取 book_id 失败，你可能需要登录！");
    }
    return arr;
}

let session = getSessionId()

getShelf = () => {
    let book_shelf_info = java.ajax(getServerHost() + "/book_shelf?session=" + session)
    
    bid = getBookIdFull(book_shelf_info)
    
    let id_list = splitArray(bid, 200)
    let urls = []
    id_list.forEach(i => {
        urls.push(getServerHost() +"/detail?book_id=" + i.join(",") + "&sessionid=" + session)
    })
    res = java.ajaxAll(urls)

    let resp = {book_info: []}
    res.forEach(r => {
        resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
    })

    return resp
}

function getByGroupName(name) {
    let book_shelf_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(getServerHost() +"/book_shelf?session=" + session))
    
    let group_bookids = {
        "未分组": []
    }
    book_shelf_info.data.book_shelf_info.forEach(i => {
        if (!group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"]) group_bookids[i.group_name] = []
        group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"].push(i.book_id)
    })
    
    if (!group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)]) return {data: []}
    
    let book_ids = splitArray(group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)], 200)
    let urls = []

    book_ids.forEach(i => { 	urls.push("https://api5-normal-sinfonlineb.fqnovel.com/reading/bookapi/multi-detail/v/?aid=1967&iid=1&version_code=999&book_id=" + i.join(","))
    })
    
    res = java.ajaxAll(urls)

    let resp = {book_info: []}
    res.forEach(r => {
        resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
    })

    return resp
}

function getByTabIndex(index) {
    let url = _mlsec.requestHeader(
        "bookmall/tab",
        "version_name=5.8.9.32",
        null,
        "sessionid=" + session
    )
    let all = JSON.parse(java.ajax(url))
    let tab = all.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[index].cell_data
    if (!tab) tab = []
    let bookList = []
    for (let i of tab) {
        bookList = bookList.concat(i.book_data)
    }
    return { book_info: bookList }
}

function normalizeResponse(data) {
    if (data.data && data.data.book_list && Array.isArray(data.data.book_list)) {
        return data.data.book_list;
    }
    
    if (data.book_info) return data.book_info;
    if (data.data && data.data.book_info) return data.data.book_info;
    if (data.data && Array.isArray(data.data)) return data.data;
    if (data.list) return data.list;
    if (data.book_list) return data.book_list;
    if (data.data && data.data.publication_list) return data.data.publication_list;
    if (data.result) return data.result;
    if (data.data && data.data.result) return data.data.result;
    if (data.data && data.data.cell_view && data.data.cell_view.book_data) {
        return data.data.cell_view.book_data;
    }
    if (data.data && data.data.records) return data.data.records;
    if (data.data && data.data.list) return data.data.list;
    
    return [];
}

if (baseUrl.includes("jj_signin")) {
    let decodedToken = java.base64Decode(JJtoken());
    let timestamp = Date.now();
    let enbody = timestamp + ':' + decodedToken;
    let encodedEnbody = encode(enbody);
    
    let signUrl = "https://app.jjwxc.org/androidapi/signin,{\"method\":\"POST\",\"body\":\"versionCode=313&sign=" + encodedEnbody + "\"}";
    
    let signinResult = java.ajax(signUrl);
    
    let result = JSON.parse(signinResult);
    let message = result.message || "签到请求完成";
    
    let responseData = {
        "isSuccess": result.code == "200",
        "errorMsg": result.code == "200" ? "success" : "fail",
        "data": [{
            "title": message
        }]
    };
    
    JSON.stringify(responseData);
} else if (baseUrl.includes("jjbookshelf")) {
    let token = JJtoken();
    let jjUrl = baseUrl + token;
    result = JSON.parse(java.ajax(jjUrl));
    JSON.stringify(result);
} else if (baseUrl.includes("type_style")) {
    let sortKey = getSortKey() || '';
    let newUrl = baseUrl + sortKey;
    result = JSON.parse(java.ajax(newUrl));
    
    let normalizedData = normalizeResponse(result);
    JSON.stringify({data: normalizedData});
} else if (baseUrl.endsWith("bookshelf")) {
    result = getShelf("bookshelf/info")
} else if(/read_history/.test(baseUrl)) {
    let pageMatch = baseUrl.match(/page=(\d+)/);
    let page = pageMatch ? pageMatch[1] : '1';
    
    let history_response = java.ajax(getServerHost() + "/read_history?session=" + session + "&page=" + page)
    let history_data = JSON.parse(history_response)
    
    if (history_data.data.data_list) {
        let book_ids = history_data.data.data_list.map(item => item.book_id_str)
        
        let id_list = splitArray(book_ids, 200)
        let urls = []
        id_list.forEach(i => {
            urls.push("https://api5-normal-sinfonlineb.fqnovel.com/reading/bookapi/multi-detail/v/?aid=1967&iid=1&version_code=999&book_id=" + i.join(","))
        })
        
        let resp = {book_info: []}
        urls.forEach(url => {
            let detailResponse = java.ajax(url)
            let detailData = JSON.parse(detailResponse)
            if (detailData.data) {
                resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(detailData.data)
            }
        })
        
        result = resp
    } else {
        result = {book_info: []}
    }
} else if (baseUrl.includes("style_top")) {
    result = JSON.parse(result);
} else {
    let w = baseUrl.split("/")
    if (baseUrl.includes("groupName")) {
        result = getByGroupName(w[w.length - 1])
    } else if (baseUrl.includes("tab")) {
        result = getByTabIndex(parseInt(w[w.length - 1]))
    } else {
        result = JSON.parse(result)
        if (result.data && result.data.data) {
            result = {book_info: result.data.data}
        }
    }
}

if (!baseUrl.includes("jjbookshelf") && !baseUrl.includes("type_style") && !baseUrl.includes("jj_signin")) {
    let normalizedData = normalizeResponse(result);
    JSON.stringify({data: normalizedData})
}
</js>

bookSourceComment:
更新日志请点击登录，更新书源中查看

基础使用教程：
1、搜索：
    1)基础搜索：在发现页长按该书源，点击搜索，直接搜，搜索范围(全部来源小说)
    2)进阶搜索：在登陆-书源设置中选择指定模式/来源，可搜索指定模式/来源内容
    3)快捷搜索：使用特殊关键词(x,t,m,d,@)搜索
         x:书名@来源  如(x:十日终焉@番茄)
         t:书名@来源  如(t:十日终焉@番茄)
         m:书名@来源  如(m:十日终焉@番茄)
         d:书名@来源  如(d:十日终焉@番茄)
         其中：x表示小说(可省略)，t表示听书，m表示漫画，d表示短剧
         冒号支持中文英文
         
2、发现页：
    在书源设置中选择指定模式或者单个来源，然后刷新发现页即可
    
3、更多使用方式长按发现页书源选择登录一目了然
4、用户后台有视频教程

var groupDatas = [];

    function groupQuery() {
        try {

            var res = java.ajax(url);
            var response = JSON.parse(res);

            if (!(response && response.data)) {}

            response.data.forEach(function(group) {
                var keys = Object.keys(group);
                if (keys.length > 0) {
                    var key = keys[0];
                    var value = group[key];
                    if (value && value.length) {
                        var option = {
                            "method": "POST",
                            "body": {
                                "book_ids": value,
                                "page": "{{page}}"
                            }
                        };
                        groupDatas.push({

                            style: {
                                layout_flexGrow: 1,
                                layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }
            });

            if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    title: "--",

                    style: {
                        layout_flexGrow: 1,
                        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                    }
                });

                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }];
        }
        groupQuery();
    } catch (e) {
        java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架");
    }
}

var style_list = [];

}

if (key3 == "") {
    java.log("当前服务器未查询到登录状态，尝试查询其他服务器登录状态...");
    let cookieValue;
    for (let h of host) {
        try {
            cookieValue = String(cookie.getCookie(h)) || String(java.getCookie(h));
            key3 = getKey(cookieValue);
        } catch (e) {
            key3 = "";
        }
        if (key3) {
            java.log(`已在${h}登录，退出查询，正在转移登录状态到当前服务${base_url}`);
            //java.log(cookieValue)
            cookie.removeCookie(h);
            cookie.removeCookie(base_url);
            cookie.setCookie(base_url, cookieValue);
            break;
        }
    }
}

if (book.readConfig == null || book.readConfig.useReplaceRule == null) {
    book.setUseReplaceRule(false);
}

let nickname = '账号状态：⚠️ 未登录 | 点击右上角 🔖 登录';
try {
    let opcx = {
        method: "GET",

        },
    };

        } else {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.email + "(请前往用户后台设置用户名)"
        }
    }
} catch (e) {
    if (key) {
        nickname = '账号状态：已登录'
    }
};

let loginStatus = nickname;

let lightDivider = "❇️───────❇️───────❇️";
let heavyDivider = "‎\n‎";

let isValid = (value) => String(value).length > 1;
let ctitle = book.durChapterTitle || '未开始';
let info = `
    📡 当前服务：${base_url}

if (tab == "听书") {

    let toneId = String(book.getVariable('custom'));

    	toneId= '4';
    	}

        info += `${lightDivider}
    🎵 音色配置：${toneId}
    ✨ AI音色请点击右上角书籍变量填写相关值，真人听书请重新搜索选择带有主播的书籍
    ${book_tts}
`;
    }
}

let basicInfo = "";
let addBasicInfo = (value, prefix, icon) => {
    if (isValid(value)) basicInfo += `    ${icon} ${prefix} ${value}\n`;
};

addBasicInfo(tags, "书籍分类：", "🌈");
addBasicInfo(role, "书籍主角：", "👑");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");

        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
        .join("\n");

${indentedAbstract}
`;

    info += `${heavyDivider}`;
}

if (isValid(copyright_info)) {
    info += `${lightDivider}
    © ${copyright_info}
`;
} else {
    info += `${lightDivider}`;
}

info += `
${heavyDivider}
    💠💠💠 数据更新于 ${new Date().toLocaleString()} 💠💠💠
`;
let jjinfo = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "info");

if (jjinfo != "off") {
    info = String(info)
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => line.replace(/^ {4}/, ""))
        .join("\n");
} else {

    addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");

        let indentedAbstract = abstract
            .split("\n")

            .join("\n");
        basicInfo += `
    \n‎
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
    } else {
        basicInfo += `${heavyDivider}`;
    }
    info = `‎\n🏷 数据来源：${sources}\n` + basicInfo;
}

});

);

} catch (e) {

        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device = "";

    }
}

if (tab == "小说") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
} else if (tab == "听书") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 32;
    } else {
        book.type = 1;
    }
} else if (tab == "漫画") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 64;
    } else {
        book.type = 2;
    }
} else if (tab == "短剧") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 3;
    }
} else {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let reading = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "reading");

if (book && book.order != 0 && reading == '1') {
    try {
        if (!data || !book.variable || !base_url || !qtcookie) {
            java.log('缺少必要参数');
        } else {
            let parsedData;
            try {
                parsedData = JSON.parse(data);
            } catch (e) {
                java.log('解析data数据失败:' + e);
            }
            
            if (parsedData && parsedData.data && Array.isArray(parsedData.data) && parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex]) {
                let ritem = parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex];
                let bookInfoObj;
                try {
                    bookInfoObj = JSON.parse(book.variable);
                } catch (e) {
                    java.log('解析book.variable失败:' + e);
                }
                
                if (bookInfoObj) {
                    let book_info;
                    try {
                        book_info = JSON.parse(bookInfoObj.book_detail || JSON.stringify(bookInfoObj));
                    } catch (e) {
                        java.log('解析book_detail失败:' + e);
                    }
                    
                    if (book_info && typeof book_info === 'object') {
                        let rurl = base_url + '/add_book_to_book_shelf,';
                        book_info['read_status'] = 1;
                        book_info['last_chapter_item_id'] = ritem.item_id || '';
                        book_info['last_chapter_title'] = ritem.title || '';
                        let rop = {
                            method: "POST",
                            headers: {
                                cookie: qtcookie
                            },
                            body: book_info
                        };
                        let check_book_url = base_url + '/check_book_in_book_shelf,';
                        let checkResponse;
                        
                        try {
                            checkResponse = java.ajax(check_book_url + JSON.stringify(rop));
                        } catch (e) {
                            java.log('检查书籍请求失败:' + e);
                        }
                        
                        if (checkResponse) {
                            let check_data;
                            try {
                                check_data = JSON.parse(checkResponse).data;
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('解析检查响应失败:' + e);
                            }
                            try {
                                if (check_data && check_data.id) {
                                    book_info['id'] = check_data.id;
                                    let uurl = base_url + '/update_book_shelf,';
                                    java.ajax(uurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                } else {
                                    java.ajax(rurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                }
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('书架操作失败:' + e);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    } catch (error) {
        java.log('书籍同步流程异常:' + error);
        java.longToast('\n同步阅读进度失败，但不影响阅读，可以前往登录关闭书架同步功能。');
    }
}
data;
</js>$.data

let disabled_sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'disabled_sources') || '0';
if (String(key).startsWith("m:") || String(key).startsWith("m：")) {
    media = "漫画"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("t:") || String(key).startsWith("t：")) {
    media = "听书"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("d:") || String(key).startsWith("d：")) {
    media = "短剧"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("x:") || String(key).startsWith("x：")) {
    media = "小说"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else {
    media = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'tab') || getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'media');
}
if (key.includes('@')) {
    var parts = key.split('@');
    key = parts[0];
    sources = parts[1] || sources;
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let op = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
`${base_url}/search?title=${key}&tab=${media}&source=${sources}&page={{page}}&disabled_sources=${disabled_sources},${op}`
</js>

    break;

    if(book.durChapterIndex == chapter.index) {
        java.startBrowser(ContentUrl, chapter.title);
        java.toast('正在加载视频\n视频加载较慢，请耐心等待');
    }
    result = "刷新进入短剧播放";
} else if(tab == 3) {
    result = res.data.content.mainUrl;
} else if(tab == 1) {
	   if(bookComment) {
	   	    let cont = java.connect(ContentUrl).body();
	   	    let cresult = JSON.parse(cont).data.content;
	   	    var html = cresult.match(/<p[^>]*>(.*?)<\/p>/g);
	   	    result = html.map(p => p.replace(/<p[^>]*>|<\/p>/g, '')).join("\n");
	   	    result = setend(result, bookId, itemId);
	   	} else {
	   		   res = JSON.parse(java.ajax(ContentUrl));
	   		   result = getComic(String(res.data.content));
	   	    result.replace(/\{\!\-\- PGC_VOICE\:.*\-\-\}/g, "");
	   	}
} else if(tab == 2) {
	   //java.log(res.data.content);
	   result = getComic(String(res.data.content));
}
	   	    
result
</js>

ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>

let ck = "sessionid=" + (String(cookie.getKey("fanqienovel.com", "sessionid")) ? String(cookie.getKey("fanqienovel.com", "sessionid")) : (source.getLoginInfoMap() || {})['手动登录Token'])

getShelf = () => {
let book_shelf_url = 'https://fanqienovel.com/reading/bookapi/bookshelf/info/v:version/?aid=1967&iid=0&version_code=57700&update_version_code=57700'
let book_shelf_info = java.ajax(book_shelf_url + ', ' + JSON.stringify({
  headers: {
    'Cookie': ck
  }
}))

bid = getBookIdFull(book_shelf_info)
let id_list = splitArray(bid, 100)
let urls = []
id_list.forEach(i => {
    urls.push(xGorgon("multi-detail", "book_id=" + i.join(","), null, ck))
})

res = java.ajaxAll(urls)

let resp = {book_info: []}
res.forEach(r => {
  resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
})

return resp
}

function getByGroupName(name) {
  let book_shelf_url = 'https://fanqienovel.com/reading/bookapi/bookshelf/info/v:version/?aid=1967&iid=0&version_code=57700&update_version_code=57700'

  let book_shelf_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(book_shelf_url + ', ' + JSON.stringify({
    headers: {
      'Cookie': ck,
    }
  })))
  let group_bookids = {
    "未分组": []
  }
  // java.log(
  book_shelf_info.data.book_shelf_info.forEach(i => {
    if (!group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"]) group_bookids[i.group_name] = []
    group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"].push(i.book_id)
  })
  // java.log(JSON.stringify(group_bookids["未分组"]))
  // java.log(decodeURIComponent(name))
  if (!group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)]) return {data: []}
  //java.log("awa")
  let book_ids = splitArray(group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)], 100)
  let urls = []

  book_ids.forEach(i => {
    urls.push(xGorgon("multi-detail", "book_id=" + i.join(","), null, ck))
  })
  
  res = java.ajaxAll(urls)

  let resp = {book_info: []}
  res.forEach(r => {
    resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
  })

  return resp
}

function getByTabIndex(index) {
  let url = xGorgon(
	  "bookmall/tab",
    "version_name=5.8.9.32&device_id=1024&device_type=114514&iid=2048",
	  null,
	  ck
  )
  let all = JSON.parse(java.ajax(url))
  let tab = all.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[index]
  // java.log(JSON.stringify(tab))
  tab = tab.cell_data
  if (!tab) tab = []
  let bookList = []
  for (let i of tab) {
    bookList = bookList.concat(i.book_data)
    // java.log(JSON.stringify(i.book_data))
  }
  return { book_info: bookList }
}

if (baseUrl.endsWith("bookshelf")) result = getShelf("bookshelf/info")
else {
  let w = baseUrl.split("/")
  if (baseUrl.includes("groupName")) {
    result = getByGroupName(w[w.length - 1])
  } else if (baseUrl.includes("tab")) {
    result = getByTabIndex(parseInt(w[w.length - 1]))
  } else result = JSON.parse(result)
}
JSON.stringify({data: result.book_info || result.data.book_info || result.detail_list || result.data})
</js>

searchUrl:
<js>
let variable = JSON.parse(source.getVariable());
const { source: { tab, mode: show }, apiIndex } = variable;

var again = false;
var keyStr = String(key);

var prefixMap = {
    "m:": { tab: 2, show: "🌄漫画" },
    "t:": { tab: 3, show: "💿听书" },
    "d:": { tab: 4, show: "📹短剧" }
};

var prefixes = ["m:", "t:", "d:"];
for (var i = 0; i < prefixes.length; i++) {
    var prefix = prefixes[i];
    if (keyStr.indexOf(prefix) === 0) {
        var config = prefixMap[prefix];
        tab = config.tab;
        show = config.show;
        key = keyStr.substring(2);
        variable.source.tab = config.tab;
        variable.source.mode = config.show;
        again = true;
        break;
    }
}

if (again) {
    source.setVariable(JSON.stringify(variable));
}

let prams = [
    `query=${key}`,
    `offset=${( page - 1) * 10}`,
    `tab=${tab}`
]

function Search(key, apiIndex, prams) {
	    let is_id = /^\d+$/.test(key);
	    if(!is_id) {
          let search = api[apiIndex] + action + "search.php?" + prams.join("&");
          return search
   } else {
        	  let book_url = api[apiIndex] + action + "detail.php?bookId=" + key;
   	       return book_url
   	}
 }
 
java.toast("\n当前来源：\n" + show);
java.put("mode", show);
Search(key, apiIndex, prams);
</js>

<js>
let replaceCover = (u) => {
    if (u.startsWith("https://")) u = u.substring(8)
    else u = u.substring(7)
    let uArr = u.split("/")
    uArr[0] = "https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin"
    let uArr2 = []
    uArr.forEach((x) => {
        if (!x.includes("?") && !x.includes("~")) uArr2.push(x)
        else uArr2.push(x.split("~")[0])
    })
    u = uArr2.join("/")
    return u
}

replaceCover(java.getString("$.thumb_url"));
</js>

bookSourceComment:
更新日志请点击登录，更新书源中查看
本书源不出意外的话基本为最终版本，后续更新都会在云端更新设置中心，不需要再更新书源，当然，不排除域名失效的情况

兼容正式版阅读app
exploreUrl:
<js>
function setArgument(key, value) {
    var open_argument = source.getVariable();
    open_argument = getArguments(open_argument, '') || {};
    open_argument[key] = value;
    var result = JSON.stringify(open_argument);
    source.setVariable(result);
    return result;
}

var open_argument = source.getVariable();
var base_url = getArguments(open_argument, 'server') || '';
var ms = getArguments(open_argument, 'tone_id') || '';
var source_type = getArguments(open_argument, 'source_type') || '男频';
var tab = getArguments(open_argument, 'tab') || '小说';
var sources = getArguments(open_argument, 'sources') || '番茄';


var sdtoken;
try {
    var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
    sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
} catch (e) {
    sdtoken = '';
}

var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
var fqssionid = '';
if (!fqcookie) {
    java.toast('您还未登陆番茄账号，无法同步数据哦！');
} else {
    fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
}
var fqsjurl = base_url + "/bookshelf?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqtjurl = base_url + "/fqrecommend?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqlsurl = base_url + "/fqhistory?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;

var groupDatas = [];
var infoData = [];

function deviceType() {
    try {
        return !!java.androidId();
    } catch (e) {
        return false;
    }
}

var hasValidCookie = fqcookie.length > 0;

if (hasValidCookie) {
    function groupQuery() {
        try {
            var url = base_url + "/group_name?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
            var res = java.ajax(url);
            var response = JSON.parse(res);

            if (!(response && response.data)) {}

            response.data.forEach(function(group) {
                var keys = Object.keys(group);
                if (keys.length > 0) {
                    var key = keys[0];
                    var value = group[key];
                    if (value && value.length) {
                        var option = {
                            "method": "POST",
                            "body": {
                                "book_ids": value,
                                "page": "{{page}}"
                            }
                        };
                        groupDatas.push({
                            title: key,
                            url: base_url + "/bookshelf," + JSON.stringify(option),
                            style: {
                                layout_flexGrow: 1,
                                layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }
            });

            if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    title: "--",
                    url: "",
                    style: {
                        layout_flexGrow: 1,
                        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                    }
                });
            }
        } catch (e) {
            java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架"+fqssionid);
        }
    }

    try {
        java.longToast("正在加载分组数据...");
        var userUrl = base_url + "/fquser?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
        var userRes = java.ajax(userUrl);
        var userData = JSON.parse(userRes);

        var userName = (userData && userData.data && userData.data.name) ? userData.data.name : '未知用户';
        if (!userName.includes('未知用户')) {
            infoData = [{
                title: "番茄个人中心",
                url: fqsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "个性推荐(番茄)",
                url: fqtjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "历史阅读(番茄)",
                url: fqlsurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }];
        }
        groupQuery();
    } catch (e) {
        java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架");
    }
}

var style_list = [];
try {
    var durl = `${base_url}/discovestyle?source=${sources}&source_type=${source_type}&tab=${tab}`;
    var res = java.ajax(durl);
    var result = JSON.parse(res);
    style_list = result.data || [];
    if (result.msg) {
        java.toast(result.msg);
    }
} catch (e) {
    java.toast("发现样式获取失败");
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let qtop = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
qtop = JSON.stringify(qtop);
let qtsjurl = base_url+'/get_book_shelf,'+qtop
let qtsj = [{
                title: "晴天个人中心",
                url: qtsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }]
var finalData = infoData.concat(groupDatas, style_list);
finalData = qtsj.concat(finalData);
JSON.stringify(finalData);
</js>

if (String(baseUrl).startsWith("data:")) {
    let res = JSON.parse(java.hexDecodeToString(result));
    let book_id = res.book_id;
    let tab = res.tab;
    let sources = res.sources;
    let url = res.url;
    let html = "";
    let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
    if (url != "" && proxy == "本地") {
        if (sources == '69书吧') {
            let ck69 = String(cookie.getCookie('https://www.69shuba.com'));
            let headers = {
        	 "Referer": url,
            "Cookie": ck69,
            "User-Agent":  java.getWebViewUA()
             };            
             let op = JSON.stringify({
                "headers": headers
            });
            html = java.ajax(`${url},${op}`);
        } else {
            html = java.ajax(url);
        }
        //java.log(html);
        if (html.includes("Just a moment...") && sources == '69书吧') {
            cookie.removeCookie('https://www.69shuba.com');

ruleBookInfo.intro:
<js>
let {
    book_id,
    source: sources,
    tab,
    book_tts,
    tags,
    role,
    last_chapter_title,
    last_chapter_update_time,
    word_number,
    status,
    score,
    abstract,
    copyright_info
} = result;
let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
if (proxy == "本地") {
    proxy = "本地网络";
} else {
    proxy = "服务器网络";
}
java.put("book_detail", JSON.stringify(result));
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
let key3 = "";
try {
    let cookieValue =
        String(cookie.getCookie(base_url)) || String(java.getCookie(base_url));
    key3 = getKey(cookieValue);
} catch (e) {
    key3 = "";
}

if (key3 == "") {
    java.log("当前服务器未查询到登录状态，尝试查询其他服务器登录状态...");
    let cookieValue;
    for (let h of host) {
        try {
            cookieValue = String(cookie.getCookie(h)) || String(java.getCookie(h));
            key3 = getKey(cookieValue);
        } catch (e) {
            key3 = "";
        }
        if (key3) {
            java.log(`已在${h}登录，退出查询，正在转移登录状态到当前服务${base_url}`);
            //java.log(cookieValue)
            removeCookie(h);
            removeCookie(base_url);
            cookie.setCookie(base_url, cookieValue);
            break;
        }
    }
}

if (book.readConfig == null || book.readConfig.useReplaceRule == null) {
    book.setUseReplaceRule(false);
}

let nickname = '账号状态：⚠️ 未登录 | 点击右上角 🔖 登录';
try {
    let opcx = {
        method: "GET",
        headers: {
            cookie: 'qttoken=' + key3 + ';'
        },
    };
    opcx = JSON.stringify(opcx);
    let user_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(base_url + '/get_avatar,' + opcx));
    if (user_info.code == 0) {
        if (user_info.nickname) {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.nickname
        } else {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.email + "(请前往用户后台设置用户名)"
        }
    }
} catch (e) {
    if (key) {
        nickname = '账号状态：已登录'
    }
};

let loginStatus = nickname;

let lightDivider = "❇️───────❇️───────❇️";
let heavyDivider = "‎\n‎";

let isValid = (value) => String(value).length > 1;
let ctitle = book.durChapterTitle || '未开始';
let info = `
    📡 当前服务：${base_url}
    🔑 ${loginStatus}
    🏷 数据来源：${sources}
    🔄 当前模式：${tab}
    ⚙️ 访问模式：${proxy}
    📖 阅读至：${ctitle}
`;

if (tab == "听书") {
    //let toneId = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "tone_id");
    let toneId = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
    if (toneId == '') {
    	toneId= '4';
    	}
    if (isValid(book_tts)) {
        info += `${lightDivider}
    🎵 音色配置：${toneId}
    ✨ AI音色请点击右上角书籍变量填写相关值，真人听书请重新搜索选择带有主播的书籍
    ${book_tts}
`;
    }
}

let basicInfo = "";
let addBasicInfo = (value, prefix, icon) => {
    if (isValid(value)) basicInfo += `    ${icon} ${prefix} ${value}\n`;
};

addBasicInfo(tags, "书籍分类：", "🌈");
addBasicInfo(role, "书籍主角：", "👑");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");

if (basicInfo) info += `${lightDivider}\n${basicInfo}`;

if (isValid(abstract)) {
    let indentedAbstract = abstract
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
        .join("\n");
    info += `${heavyDivider}
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
} else {
    info += `${heavyDivider}`;
}

if (isValid(copyright_info)) {
    info += `${lightDivider}
    © ${copyright_info}
`;
} else {
    info += `${lightDivider}`;
}

info += `
${heavyDivider}
    💠💠💠 数据更新于 ${new Date().toLocaleString()} 💠💠💠
`;
let jjinfo = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "info");

if (jjinfo != "off") {
    info = String(info)
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => line.replace(/^ {4}/, ""))
        .join("\n");
} else {
    basicInfo = "";
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
    addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
    addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
    addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");
    if (isValid(abstract)) {
        let indentedAbstract = abstract
            .split("\n")
            .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
            .join("\n");
        basicInfo += `
    \n‎
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
    } else {
        basicInfo += `${heavyDivider}`;
    }
    info = `‎\n🏷 数据来源：${sources}\n` + basicInfo;
}

);
let device, device_type;

    device_type = "苹果";

        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device = "";
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

if (tab == "小说") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
} else if (tab == "听书") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 32;
    } else {
        book.type = 1;
    }
} else if (tab == "漫画") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 64;
    } else {
        book.type = 2;
    }
} else if (tab == "短剧") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 3;
    }
} else {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
}

let reading = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "reading");

if (book && book.order != 0 && reading == '1') {
    try {
        if (!data || !book.variable || !base_url || !qtcookie) {
            java.log('缺少必要参数');
        } else {
            let parsedData;
            try {
                parsedData = JSON.parse(data);
            } catch (e) {
                java.log('解析data数据失败:' + e);
            }
            
            if (parsedData && parsedData.data && Array.isArray(parsedData.data) && parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex]) {
                let ritem = parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex];
                let bookInfoObj;
                try {
                    bookInfoObj = JSON.parse(book.variable);
                } catch (e) {
                    java.log('解析book.variable失败:' + e);
                }
                
                if (bookInfoObj) {
                    let book_info;
                    try {
                        book_info = JSON.parse(bookInfoObj.book_detail || JSON.stringify(bookInfoObj));
                    } catch (e) {
                        java.log('解析book_detail失败:' + e);
                    }
                    
                    if (book_info && typeof book_info === 'object') {
                        let rurl = base_url + '/add_book_to_book_shelf,';
                        book_info['read_status'] = 1;
                        book_info['last_chapter_item_id'] = ritem.item_id || '';
                        book_info['last_chapter_title'] = ritem.title || '';
                        let rop = {
                            method: "POST",
                            headers: {
                                cookie: qtcookie
                            },
                            body: book_info
                        };
                        let check_book_url = base_url + '/check_book_in_book_shelf,';
                        let checkResponse;
                        
                        try {
                            checkResponse = java.ajax(check_book_url + JSON.stringify(rop));
                        } catch (e) {
                            java.log('检查书籍请求失败:' + e);
                        }
                        
                        if (checkResponse) {
                            let check_data;
                            try {
                                check_data = JSON.parse(checkResponse).data;
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('解析检查响应失败:' + e);
                            }
                            try {
                                if (check_data && check_data.id) {
                                    book_info['id'] = check_data.id;
                                    let uurl = base_url + '/update_book_shelf,';
                                    java.ajax(uurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                } else {
                                    java.ajax(rurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                }
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('书架操作失败:' + e);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    } catch (error) {
        java.log('书籍同步流程异常:' + error);
        java.longToast('\n同步阅读进度失败，但不影响阅读，可以前往登录关闭书架同步功能。');
    }
}
data;

    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("x:") || String(key).startsWith("x：")) {
    media = "小说"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else {
    media = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'tab') || getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'media');
}
if (key.includes('@')) {
    var parts = key.split('@');
    key = parts[0];
    sources = parts[1] || sources;
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let op = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
`${base_url}/search?title=${key}&tab=${media}&source=${sources}&page={{page}}&disabled_sources=${disabled_sources},${op}`
</js>

[content.slice(-12), content.slice(0, -12)] : [content.slice(0, 12), content.slice(12)]; let key = java.md5Encode(v43 + v38).slice(0, 8); let iv = java.md5Encode(v38).slice(0, 8); content = java.createSymmetricCrypto("DES/CBC/PKCS5Padding", key, iv).decryptStr(dest); } return content } let intro = String(java.get("intro1")).replace(/\s/g, ''); const hasContent = /"content"/.test(result); java.setContent(hasContent ? result : decode()); intro = intro ? `◎${intro}◎
` : ''; let content = String(java.getString("$..content")); let saybody = String((/关闭作话/.test(bbb) || /关闭作话/.test(sss))?"":java.getString("$..sayBody")); saybody = saybody.replace(/(?:.*(?:蟹蟹|扔了|感谢|投出|灌溉营养液|送的|谢谢).*?(?:手榴|月票|霸王票|小天使|火箭炮|深水鱼雷|浅水炸弹|地雷|营养液)([xX]\d+)*.*|非常感谢大家对我的支持，我会继续努力的！|.*?瓶[；~]|“.*?”(?:营养液|手榴弹|月票|霸王票|小天使|火箭炮|深水鱼雷|浅水炸弹|地雷)x\d+|读者.*?(月石|营养液).*|地雷感谢：[\s\S]+)/g,''); let say = /[\u4e00-\u9fa5]/.test(saybody) ? `\n【📢作者有话说】\n${saybody}` : ''; if (/token|vipContent/.test(baseUrl)) { const vipc = content.length > 30 ? java.createSymmetricCrypto("DES/CBC/PKCS5Padding", "KW8Dvm2N", "1ae2c94b").decryptStr(content) : `${/23110/.test(String(java.getString("$..message")))?"请使用安卓端的token":java.getString("$..message")}\n❗️登录后请先更新目录，再刷新正文`; result = intro + vipc + say; } else { result = intro + content + say; } } result; }catch(e){ java.log(e) } ##为营造更好的评论环境，近期网站要求发评须进行实名认证，未实名用户评论暂时仅在对应作者后台及发评用户后台可见.*|获取正文失败[\s\S]+|◎\s+?◎|◎undefined◎

function removeDuplicatedParagraphs(text, chapterTitle) {
    var paragraphs = text.split('\n');
    var firstParagraph = paragraphs[0].trim();
    var containsSpecialChar = firstParagraph.includes('◎');
    var targetIndex = containsSpecialChar ? 1 : 0;
    var targetParagraph = paragraphs[targetIndex].trim();
    var lastChar = targetParagraph.charAt(targetParagraph.length - 1);
    var isPunctuation = /[——◎。！？，；：\?!,;:》 】）”’…~"'\)]/.test(lastChar);
    
    if (!isPunctuation) {
        for (var i = 0; i < chapterTitle.length - 1; i++) {
            var twoChars = chapterTitle.substring(i, i + 2);
            if (twoChars === '  ' || twoChars.includes('☪')) continue;
            
            if (targetParagraph.includes(twoChars)) {
                java.log("删除当前段落：" + targetParagraph);
                java.log("当前章节名：" + chapterTitle);
                java.log("相同连续文字：" + twoChars);
                paragraphs.splice(targetIndex, 1);
                break;
            }
        }
    }
    return paragraphs.join('\n');
}


let bbb = String(book.getVariable("custom"));

if(/净化/.test(sss)||/净化/.test(bbb))result = removeDuplicatedParagraphs(result, title);
result = result.replace(/<br\/>/g,'\n');

result
</js>

<js>
if(/incrementFavorite/.test(baseUrl)){
let order = Number(java.get("order"));
function sortBooks(data, order) {
  let sortedData = JSON.parse(data).addData;
  if (java.get("classid") == "0") {
    sortedData = sortedData.filter(book => book.classId === "0");
  }
  switch(order) {
    case 1: 
      sortedData.sort((a, b) => {   	
        return Date.parse(b.chapterdateNewest.replace(/ /,'T')) - Date.parse(a.chapterdateNewest.replace(/ /,'T'));
      });
      break;   
    case 2:
      sortedData.sort((a, b) => {
        return Number(b.favoriteDate) - Number(a.favoriteDate);
      });
      break;    
    case 3:
      sortedData.sort((a, b) => {
        return Number(b.novelbefavoritedcount) - Number(a.novelbefavoritedcount);
      });
      break;    
    case 4:   
      sortedData.sort((a, b) => {
        return Number(b.original_novelsize) - Number(a.original_novelsize);
      });
      break;    
    default:
      break;
  }
  return sortedData;
}
result = JSON.stringify(sortBooks(src,order))
	}
	
function transformNovelList(jsonData) {
    const data = typeof jsonData === 'string' ? JSON.parse(jsonData) : jsonData;
    Object.keys(data.novellist).forEach(categoryName => {
        data.novellist[categoryName].forEach(novel => {
            novel.cname = categoryName;
        });
    });
    
    return JSON.stringify(data)
}

	}
result

variableComment:
源变量

填写【移出/加入/移入书架数据】 —— 这是用来操作晋江app的收藏的，如
移出尚未分类::0 会把当前书籍移出晋江的收藏
加入尚未分类::0,1,1 会加入收藏至晋江的尚未分类书架
移入尚未分类::0,0,2 会把已加入晋江收藏的书籍移入晋江的尚未分类书架。
书架数据：在登录页的【📚获取书架】获取，获取后将显示在源变量设置
刷新详情页生效之后会删除【移出/加入/移入书架数据】字样。
填写【批量移出/加入/移入书架数据】则不会自动删除这些字样，在阅读的书架刷新会批量操作，需要手动删除，避免重复请求。

其他源变量操作请在登录里查看【使用说明】

   java.log(url)

	sign_key='d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1'

params={'id':{{$.book_id}}, 'imei_ip':'2937357107','teeny_mode':0}

var urlEncode = function (param, key, encode) {  
  if(param==null) return '';  
  var paramStr = '';  
  var t = typeof (param);  
  if (t == 'string' || t == 'number' || t == 'boolean') {  
    paramStr += '&' + key + '=' + ((encode==null||encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);  
  } else {  
    for (var i in param) {  
      var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? '[' + i + ']' : '.' + i);  
      paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);  
    }  
  }  
  return paramStr;  
};

exploreUrl:
<js>
function setArgument(key, value) {
    var open_argument = source.getVariable();
    open_argument = getArguments(open_argument, '') || {};
    open_argument[key] = value;
    var result = JSON.stringify(open_argument);
    source.setVariable(result);
    return result;
}

var open_argument = source.getVariable();
var base_url = getArguments(open_argument, 'server') || '';
var ms = getArguments(open_argument, 'tone_id') || '';
var source_type = getArguments(open_argument, 'source_type') || '男频';
var tab = getArguments(open_argument, 'media') || '小说';
var sources = getArguments(open_argument, 'source') || '番茄';


var sdtoken;
try {
    var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
    sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
} catch (e) {
    sdtoken = '';
}

var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
var fqssionid = '';
if (!fqcookie) {
    java.toast('您还未登陆番茄账号，无法同步数据哦！');
} else {
    fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
}
var fqsjurl = base_url + "/bookshelf?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqtjurl = base_url + "/fqrecommend?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqlsurl = base_url + "/fqhistory?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;

var groupDatas = [];
var infoData = [];

function deviceType() {
    try {
        return !!java.androidId();
    } catch (e) {
        return false;
    }
}

var hasValidCookie = fqcookie.length > 0;

if (hasValidCookie) {
    function groupQuery() {
        try {
            var url = base_url + "/group_name?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
            var res = java.ajax(url);
            var response = JSON.parse(res);

            if (!(response && response.data)) {}

            response.data.forEach(function(group) {
                var keys = Object.keys(group);
                if (keys.length > 0) {
                    var key = keys[0];
                    var value = group[key];
                    if (value && value.length) {
                        var option = {
                            "method": "POST",
                            "body": {
                                "book_ids": value,
                                "page": "{{page}}"
                            }
                        };
                        groupDatas.push({
                            title: key,
                            url: base_url + "/bookshelf," + JSON.stringify(option),
                            style: {
                                layout_flexGrow: 1,
                                layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }
            });

            if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    title: "--",
                    url: "",
                    style: {
                        layout_flexGrow: 1,
                        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                    }
                });
            }
        } catch (e) {
            java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架");
        }
    }

    try {
        java.longToast("正在加载分组数据...");
        var userUrl = base_url + "/fquser?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
        var userRes = java.ajax(userUrl);
        var userData = JSON.parse(userRes);

        var userName = (userData && userData.data && userData.data.name) ? userData.data.name : '未知用户';
        if (!userName.includes('未知用户')) {
            infoData = [{
                title: "番茄个人中心",
                url: fqsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "个性推荐(番茄)",
                url: fqtjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "历史阅读(番茄)",
                url: fqlsurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }];
        }
        groupQuery();
    } catch (e) {
        java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架");
    }
}

var style_list = [];
try {
    var durl = `${base_url}/discovestyle?source=${sources}&source_type=${source_type}&tab=${tab}`;
    var res = java.ajax(durl);
    var result = JSON.parse(res);
    style_list = result.data || [];
    if (result.msg) {
        java.toast(result.msg);
    }
} catch (e) {
    java.toast("发现样式获取失败");
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let qtop = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
qtop = JSON.stringify(qtop);
let qtsjurl = base_url+'/get_book_shelf,'+qtop
let qtsj = [{
                title: "大灰狼个人中心",
                url: qtsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }]
var finalData = infoData.concat(groupDatas, style_list);
finalData = qtsj.concat(finalData);
JSON.stringify(finalData);
</js>
