ruleBookInfo.intro:
<js>
let {
    book_id,
    source: sources,
    tab,
    book_tts,
    tags,
    role,
    last_chapter_title,
    last_chapter_update_time,
    word_number,
    status,
    score,
    abstract,
    copyright_info
} = result;
let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
if (proxy == "本地") {
    proxy = "本地网络";
} else {
    proxy = "服务器网络";
}
java.put("book_detail", JSON.stringify(result));
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
var key = "";
try {
    let cookieValue =
        String(cookie.getCookie(base_url)) || String(java.getCookie(base_url));
    key = getKey(cookieValue);
} catch (e) {
    key = "";
}

if (key == "") {
    java.log("当前服务器未查询到登录状态，尝试查询其他服务器登录状态...");
    let cookieValue;
    for (let h of host) {
        try {
            cookieValue = String(cookie.getCookie(h)) || String(java.getCookie(h));
            key = getKey(cookieValue);
        } catch (e) {
            key = "";
        }
        if (key) {
            java.log(`已在${h}登录，退出查询，正在转移登录状态到当前服务${base_url}`);
            //java.log(cookieValue)
            removeCookie(h);
            removeCookie(base_url);
            cookie.setCookie(base_url, cookieValue);
            break;
        }
    }
}

if (book.readConfig == null || book.readConfig.useReplaceRule == null) {
    book.setUseReplaceRule(false);
}

let nickname = '账号状态：⚠️ 未登录 | 点击右上角 🔖 登录';
try {
    let opcx = {
        method: "GET",
        headers: {
            cookie: 'qttoken=' + key + ';'
        },
    };
    opcx = JSON.stringify(opcx);
    let user_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(base_url + '/get_avatar,' + opcx));
    if (user_info.code == 0) {
        if (user_info.nickname) {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.nickname
        } else {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.email + "(请前往用户后台设置用户名)"
        }
    }
} catch (e) {
    if (key) {
        nickname = '账号状态：已登录'
    }
};

let loginStatus = nickname;

let lightDivider = "❇️───────❇️───────❇️";
let heavyDivider = "‎\n‎";

let isValid = (value) => String(value).length > 1;
let ctitle = book.durChapterTitle || '未开始';
let info = `
    📡 当前服务：${base_url}
    🔑 ${loginStatus}
    🏷 数据来源：${sources}
    🔄 当前模式：${tab}
    ⚙️ 访问模式：${proxy}
    📖 阅读至：${ctitle}
`;

if (tab == "听书") {
    let toneId = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "tone_id");
    if (isValid(book_tts)) {
        info += `${lightDivider}
    🎵 音色配置：${toneId}
    ${book_tts}
`;
    }
}

let basicInfo = "";
let addBasicInfo = (value, prefix, icon) => {
    if (isValid(value)) basicInfo += `    ${icon} ${prefix} ${value}\n`;
};

addBasicInfo(tags, "书籍分类：", "🌈");
addBasicInfo(role, "书籍主角：", "👑");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");

if (basicInfo) info += `${lightDivider}\n${basicInfo}`;

if (isValid(abstract)) {
    let indentedAbstract = abstract
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
        .join("\n");
    info += `${heavyDivider}
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
} else {
    info += `${heavyDivider}`;
}

if (isValid(copyright_info)) {
    info += `${lightDivider}
    © ${copyright_info}
`;
} else {
    info += `${lightDivider}`;
}

info += `
${heavyDivider}
    💠💠💠 数据更新于 ${new Date().toLocaleString()} 💠💠💠
`;
let jjinfo = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "info");

if (jjinfo != "on") {
    info = String(info)
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => line.replace(/^ {4}/, ""))
        .join("\n");
} else {
    basicInfo = "";
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
    addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
    addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
    addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");
    if (isValid(abstract)) {
        let indentedAbstract = abstract
            .split("\n")
            .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
            .join("\n");
        basicInfo += `
    \n‎
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
    } else {
        basicInfo += `${heavyDivider}`;
    }
    info = `‎\n🏷 数据来源：${sources}\n` + basicInfo;
}
</js>

}

};

    }
};

op = JSON.stringify(op);

        java.toast(data.msg);

} catch (e) {}

content = data.content

if ((sources == "番茄" || sources == "七猫" || sources == "塔读") && getArguments(source.getVariable(), "fqpara") == "on" && tab == "小说") {
    var fqssionid = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "fqssionid") || "";
    content = content
        .replace(/ident="/g, 'ident="' + base_url)
        .replace(/book_id=/g, 'book_id=' + book_id + '&ssionid=' + fqssionid);
    if (device_type == "苹果") {
        content = paraForiOS(content, sources);
    } else {

    }


}
data = JSON.stringify({

});

if (device_type == "安卓" && (tab == "短剧" || tab == "视频" || sources == '毒舌影视')) {

    };

            video_url = content;
        };
        java.startBrowser(video_url, title);
        java.toast("正在加载视频...");
    }

}
data;

<js>

if (res.method) {
    res = Object.fromEntries(
        res.body
        .replace("source", "sources")
        .split("&")
        .map((query) => query.split("="))
    );
    res.url = "";
}
let book_id = res.book_id;
java.put('book_id', book_id);
let tab = res.tab;
let sources = res.sources;
let url = res.url;
let html = "";
let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
if (url != "" && proxy == "本地") {
    if (sources == '69书吧') {
        let ck69 = String(cookie.getCookie(url));
        let headers = {
            "Cookie": ck69
        };
        let op = JSON.stringify({
            "headers": headers
        });
        html = java.ajax(url + ',' + op);
    } else {
        html = java.ajax(url);
    }
    //java.log(html);
    if (html.includes("Just a moment...") && sources == '69书吧') {
        cookie.removeCookie(url);
        var x = `https://www.69shuba.com`;
        java.longToast('需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证');
        var s = java.startBrowserAwait(x, "需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证").body();

        let ck69 = String(cookie.getCookie(url));
        let headers = {
            "Cookie": ck69
        };
        let op = JSON.stringify({
            "headers": headers
        });
        //java.log(op);
        html = java.ajax(url + ',' + op);
        //java.log(html);
    }
};
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
let op = {
    method: "POST",
    body: {
        html: html
    }
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
let varia = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
if (varia == 'null') {
    varia = '';
}
varia = JSON.stringify({
    'custom': varia
});
// varia = java.base64Encode(varia);
//java.log(`${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);
let data = java.ajax(
    `${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`
);
let device, device_type;
try {
    device = java.deviceID();
    device_type = "苹果";
} catch (e) {
    try {
        device = java.androidId();
        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device = "";
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

if (tab == "小说") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
} else if (tab == "听书") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 32;
    } else {
        book.type = 1;
    }
} else if (tab == "漫画") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 64;
    } else {
        book.type = 2;
    }
} else if (tab == "短剧") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 3;
    }
} else {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let reading = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "reading");

if (book && book.order != 0 && reading == '1') {
    try {
        if (!data || !book.variable || !base_url || !qtcookie) {
            java.log('缺少必要参数');
        } else {
            let parsedData;
            try {
                parsedData = JSON.parse(data);
            } catch (e) {
                java.log('解析data数据失败:' + e);
            }
            
            if (parsedData && parsedData.data && Array.isArray(parsedData.data) && parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex]) {
                let ritem = parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex];
                let bookInfoObj;
                try {
                    bookInfoObj = JSON.parse(book.variable);
                } catch (e) {
                    java.log('解析book.variable失败:' + e);
                }
                
                if (bookInfoObj) {
                    let book_info;
                    try {
                        book_info = JSON.parse(bookInfoObj.book_detail || JSON.stringify(bookInfoObj));
                    } catch (e) {
                        java.log('解析book_detail失败:' + e);
                    }
                    
                    if (book_info && typeof book_info === 'object') {
                        let rurl = base_url + '/add_book_to_book_shelf,';
                        book_info['read_status'] = 1;
                        book_info['last_chapter_item_id'] = ritem.item_id || '';
                        book_info['last_chapter_title'] = ritem.title || '';
                        let rop = {
                            method: "POST",
                            headers: {
                                cookie: qtcookie
                            },
                            body: book_info
                        };
                        let check_book_url = base_url + '/check_book_in_book_shelf,';
                        let checkResponse;
                        
                        try {
                            checkResponse = java.ajax(check_book_url + JSON.stringify(rop));
                        } catch (e) {
                            java.log('检查书籍请求失败:' + e);
                        }
                        
                        if (checkResponse) {
                            let check_data;
                            try {
                                check_data = JSON.parse(checkResponse).data;
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('解析检查响应失败:' + e);
                            }
                            try {
                                if (check_data && check_data.id) {
                                    book_info['id'] = check_data.id;
                                    let uurl = base_url + '/update_book_shelf,';
                                    java.ajax(uurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                } else {
                                    java.ajax(rurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                }
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('书架操作失败:' + e);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    } catch (error) {
        java.log('书籍同步流程异常:' + error);
        java.longToast('\n同步阅读进度失败，但不影响阅读，可以前往登录关闭书架同步功能。');
    }
}
data;
</js>$.data

searchUrl:
<js>
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'server');
let media;
let sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'source');
let disabled_sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'disabled_sources');
if (String(key).startsWith("m:") || String(key).startsWith("m：")) {
    media = "漫画"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("t:") || String(key).startsWith("t：")) {
    media = "听书"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("d:") || String(key).startsWith("d：")) {
    media = "短剧"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("x:") || String(key).startsWith("x：")) {
    media = "小说"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else {
    media = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'media');
}
if (key.includes('@')) {
    var parts = key.split('@');
    key = parts[0];
    sources = parts[1] || sources;
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let op = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
`${base_url}/search?title=${key}&tab=${media}&source=${sources}&page={{page}}&disabled_sources=${disabled_sources},${op}`
</js>

exploreUrl:
<js>
function setArgument(key, value) {
    var open_argument = source.getVariable();
    open_argument = getArguments(open_argument, '') || {};
    open_argument[key] = value;
    var result = JSON.stringify(open_argument);
    source.setVariable(result);
    return result;
}

var open_argument = source.getVariable();
var base_url = getArguments(open_argument, 'server') || '';
var ms = getArguments(open_argument, 'tone_id') || '';
var source_type = getArguments(open_argument, 'source_type') || '男频';
var tab = getArguments(open_argument, 'media') || '小说';
var sources = getArguments(open_argument, 'source') || '番茄';


var sdtoken;
try {
    var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
    sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
} catch (e) {
    sdtoken = '';
}

var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
var fqssionid = '';
if (!fqcookie) {
    java.toast('您还未登陆番茄账号，无法同步数据哦！');
} else {
    fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
}
var fqsjurl = base_url + "/bookshelf?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqtjurl = base_url + "/fqrecommend?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqlsurl = base_url + "/fqhistory?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;

var groupDatas = [];
var infoData = [];

function deviceType() {
    try {
        return !!java.androidId();
    } catch (e) {
        return false;
    }
}

var hasValidCookie = fqcookie.length > 0;

if (hasValidCookie) {
    function groupQuery() {
        try {
            var url = base_url + "/group_name?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
            var res = java.ajax(url);
            var response = JSON.parse(res);

            if (!(response && response.data)) {}

            response.data.forEach(function(group) {
                var keys = Object.keys(group);
                if (keys.length > 0) {
                    var key = keys[0];
                    var value = group[key];
                    if (value && value.length) {
                        var option = {
                            "method": "POST",
                            "body": {
                                "book_ids": value,
                                "page": "{{page}}"
                            }
                        };
                        groupDatas.push({
                            title: key,
                            url: base_url + "/bookshelf," + JSON.stringify(option),
                            style: {
                                layout_flexGrow: 1,
                                layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }
            });

            if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    title: "--",
                    url: "",
                    style: {
                        layout_flexGrow: 1,
                        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                    }
                });
            }
        } catch (e) {
            java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架");
        }
    }

    try {
        java.longToast("正在加载分组数据...");
        var userUrl = base_url + "/fquser?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
        var userRes = java.ajax(userUrl);
        var userData = JSON.parse(userRes);

        var userName = (userData && userData.data && userData.data.name) ? userData.data.name : '未知用户';
        if (!userName.includes('未知用户')) {
            infoData = [{
                title: "番茄个人中心",
                url: fqsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "个性推荐(番茄)",
                url: fqtjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "历史阅读(番茄)",
                url: fqlsurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }];
        }
        groupQuery();
    } catch (e) {
        java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架");
    }
}

var style_list = [];
try {
    var durl = `${base_url}/discovestyle?source=${sources}&source_type=${source_type}&tab=${tab}`;
    var res = java.ajax(durl);
    var result = JSON.parse(res);
    style_list = result.data || [];
    if (result.msg) {
        java.toast(result.msg);
    }
} catch (e) {
    java.toast("发现样式获取失败");
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let qtop = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
qtop = JSON.stringify(qtop);
let qtsjurl = base_url+'/get_book_shelf,'+qtop
let qtsj = [{
                title: "大灰狼个人中心",
                url: qtsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }]
var finalData = infoData.concat(groupDatas, style_list);
finalData = qtsj.concat(finalData);
JSON.stringify(finalData);
</js>

ruleBookInfo.intro:
<js>
let {
    book_id,
    source: sources,
    tab,
    book_tts,
    tags,
    role,
    last_chapter_title,
    last_chapter_update_time,
    word_number,
    status,
    score,
    abstract,
    copyright_info
} = result;
let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
if (proxy == "本地") {
    proxy = "本地网络";
} else {
    proxy = "服务器网络";
}
java.put("book_detail", JSON.stringify(result));
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
var key = "";
try {
    let cookieValue =
        String(cookie.getCookie(base_url)) || String(java.getCookie(base_url));
    key = getKey(cookieValue);
} catch (e) {
    key = "";
}

if (key == "") {
    java.log("当前服务器未查询到登录状态，尝试查询其他服务器登录状态...");
    let cookieValue;
    for (let h of host) {
        try {
            cookieValue = String(cookie.getCookie(h)) || String(java.getCookie(h));
            key = getKey(cookieValue);
        } catch (e) {
            key = "";
        }
        if (key) {
            java.log(`已在${h}登录，退出查询，正在转移登录状态到当前服务${base_url}`);
            //java.log(cookieValue)
            removeCookie(h);
            removeCookie(base_url);
            cookie.setCookie(base_url, cookieValue);
            break;
        }
    }
}

if (book.readConfig == null || book.readConfig.useReplaceRule == null) {
    book.setUseReplaceRule(false);
}

let nickname = '账号状态：⚠️ 未登录 | 点击右上角 🔖 登录';
try {
    let opcx = {
        method: "GET",
        headers: {
            cookie: 'qttoken=' + key + ';'
        },
    };
    opcx = JSON.stringify(opcx);
    let user_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(base_url + '/get_avatar,' + opcx));
    if (user_info.code == 0) {
        if (user_info.nickname) {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.nickname
        } else {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.email + "(请前往用户后台设置用户名)"
        }
    }
} catch (e) {
    if (key) {
        nickname = '账号状态：已登录'
    }
};

let loginStatus = nickname;

let lightDivider = "❇️───────❇️───────❇️";
let heavyDivider = "‎\n‎";

let isValid = (value) => String(value).length > 1;
let ctitle = book.durChapterTitle || '未开始';
let info = `
    📡 当前服务：${base_url}
    🔑 ${loginStatus}
    🏷 数据来源：${sources}
    🔄 当前模式：${tab}
    ⚙️ 访问模式：${proxy}
    📖 阅读至：${ctitle}
`;

if (tab == "听书") {
    let toneId = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "tone_id");
    if (isValid(book_tts)) {
        info += `${lightDivider}
    🎵 音色配置：${toneId}
    ${book_tts}
`;
    }
}

let basicInfo = "";
let addBasicInfo = (value, prefix, icon) => {
    if (isValid(value)) basicInfo += `    ${icon} ${prefix} ${value}\n`;
};

addBasicInfo(tags, "书籍分类：", "🌈");
addBasicInfo(role, "书籍主角：", "👑");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");

if (basicInfo) info += `${lightDivider}\n${basicInfo}`;

if (isValid(abstract)) {
    let indentedAbstract = abstract
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
        .join("\n");
    info += `${heavyDivider}
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
} else {
    info += `${heavyDivider}`;
}

if (isValid(copyright_info)) {
    info += `${lightDivider}
    © ${copyright_info}
`;
} else {
    info += `${lightDivider}`;
}

info += `
${heavyDivider}
    💠💠💠 数据更新于 ${new Date().toLocaleString()} 💠💠💠
`;
let jjinfo = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "info");

if (jjinfo != "on") {
    info = String(info)
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => line.replace(/^ {4}/, ""))
        .join("\n");
} else {
    basicInfo = "";
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
    addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
    addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
    addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");
    if (isValid(abstract)) {
        let indentedAbstract = abstract
            .split("\n")
            .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
            .join("\n");
        basicInfo += `
    \n‎
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
    } else {
        basicInfo += `${heavyDivider}`;
    }
    info = `‎\n🏷 数据来源：${sources}\n` + basicInfo;
}
</js>

let tab = result.tab || "小说";

var sdtoken;
try {
    var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
    sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
} catch (e) {
    sdtoken = '';
}
var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
var fqssionid = '';
if (fqcookie) {
    fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie);
};
setArguments('fqssionid', fqssionid);
java.put("tab", tab);

`data:;base64,${qtcatalog},{"type":"qingtian2"}`;

ruleContent.content:
<js>
result = String(java.hexDecodeToString(result));
let res;
if (result.match(/大灰狼融合/)) {
    result = result.split("大灰狼融合4");
    res = {
        item_id: result[0],
        tab: result[1],
        title: result[2],
        sources: result[3],
        url: ""
    };
} else {
    res = JSON.parse(result);
}
let varia = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
if (varia == 'null') {
    varia = '';
}
varia = JSON.stringify({
    'custom': varia
});
//  varia = java.base64Encode(varia);
let book_id = res.book_id;
let item_id = res.item_id;
let tab = res.tab;
let title = res.title;
let sources = res.sources;
let url = res.url;
let html = "";
let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
if (url != "" && proxy == "本地") {
    if (sources == '69书吧') {
        let ck69 = String(cookie.getCookie(url));
        let headers = {
            "Cookie": ck69,
            "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 6.0; Nexus 5 Build/MRA58N) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/138.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36 Edg/138.0.0.0"
        };
        let op = JSON.stringify({
            "headers": headers
        });
        java.log(url);
        java.log(op);
        html = java.ajax(url + ',' + op);
    } else {
        html = java.ajax(url);
    }
    java.log(html);
    if (html.includes("Just a moment...") && sources == '69书吧' && book.durChapterIndex === chapter.index) {
        cookie.removeCookie(url);
        var x = url;
        java.longToast('需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证');
        var s = java.startBrowserAwait(x, "需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证").body();

        let ck69 = String(cookie.getCookie(url));
        let headers = {
            "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 6.0; Nexus 5 Build/MRA58N) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/138.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36 Edg/138.0.0.0",
            "Cookie": ck69
        };
        let op = JSON.stringify({
            "headers": headers
        });
        java.log(op);
        html = java.ajax(url + ',' + op);
        //java.log(html);
    }
};
let content = "";
let data;
let tone_id = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "tone_id");
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
let device, device_type;
try {
    device = java.deviceID();
    device_type = "苹果";
} catch (e) {
    try {
        device = java.androidId();
        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device = "";
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
try {
    qtcookie = `qttoken=${String(cookie.getKey(base_url, "qttoken"))}; deviceId=${device};`
} catch (e) {}

var params = {
    html: html,
    item_id: item_id,
    source: sources,
    tab: tab,
    tone_id: tone_id,
    variable: varia,
    version: '4.11.5.1'
};

var content_url = '/content';

if ((sources == "番茄" || sources == "七猫" || sources == "塔读") && getArguments(source.getVariable(), "fqpara") == "on" && tab == "小说") {
    content_url = '/content?review=1';
}

//var signInfo = generateComplexSignature('POST', content_url, {}, APP_SECRET, params);


//var signedParams = copyObject(params);
//signedParams.timestamp = signInfo.timestamp;
//signedParams.nonce = signInfo.nonce;
//signedParams.sign = signInfo.sign;


var op = {
    method: "POST",
    body: JSON.stringify(params),
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie,
        'Content-Type': 'application/json'
    }
};

op = JSON.stringify(op);
java.log(op);
data = java.ajax(base_url + content_url + `,${op}`);

try {
    data = JSON.parse(data);
    if (data.msg) {
        java.toast(data.msg);
    }
} catch (e) {}

content = data.content

if ((sources == "番茄" || sources == "七猫" || sources == "塔读") && getArguments(source.getVariable(), "fqpara") == "on" && tab == "小说") {
    var fqssionid = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "fqssionid") || "";
    content = content
        .replace(/ident="/g, 'ident="' + base_url)
        .replace(/book_id=/g, 'book_id=' + book_id + '&ssionid=' + fqssionid);
    if (device_type == "苹果") {
        content = paraForiOS(content, sources);
    } else {
        content = paraForAndroid(content, sources);
    }


}
data = JSON.stringify({
    content: content,
});

if (device_type == "安卓" && (tab == "短剧" || tab == "视频" || sources == '毒舌影视')) {
    data = {
        content: `【右上角刷新】开启播放(下一集请切换下一章刷新)\n播放直链：\n${content}`,
    };
    data = JSON.stringify(data);
    if (book.durChapterIndex === chapter.index) {
        let video_url = `${base_url}/online_video?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}`;
        if (sources == '毒舌影视') {
            video_url = content;
        };
        java.startBrowser(video_url, title);
        java.toast("正在加载视频...");
    }

}
data;
</js>$.content

//java.log(`${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);
let data = java.ajax(
    `${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`
);
let device, device_type;
try {
    device = java.deviceID();
    device_type = "苹果";
} catch (e) {
    try {
        device = java.androidId();
        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device = "";
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

if (tab == "小说") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
} else if (tab == "听书") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 32;
    } else {
        book.type = 1;
    }
} else if (tab == "漫画") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 64;
    } else {
        book.type = 2;
    }
} else if (tab == "短剧") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 3;
    }
} else {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let reading = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "reading");

if (book && book.order != 0 && reading == '1') {
    try {
        if (!data || !book.variable || !base_url || !qtcookie) {
            java.log('缺少必要参数');
        } else {
            let parsedData;
            try {
                parsedData = JSON.parse(data);
            } catch (e) {
                java.log('解析data数据失败:' + e);
            }
            
            if (parsedData && parsedData.data && Array.isArray(parsedData.data) && parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex]) {
                let ritem = parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex];
                let bookInfoObj;
                try {
                    bookInfoObj = JSON.parse(book.variable);
                } catch (e) {
                    java.log('解析book.variable失败:' + e);
                }
                
                if (bookInfoObj) {
                    let book_info;
                    try {
                        book_info = JSON.parse(bookInfoObj.book_detail || JSON.stringify(bookInfoObj));
                    } catch (e) {
                        java.log('解析book_detail失败:' + e);
                    }
                    
                    if (book_info && typeof book_info === 'object') {
                        let rurl = base_url + '/add_book_to_book_shelf,';
                        book_info['read_status'] = 1;
                        book_info['last_chapter_item_id'] = ritem.item_id || '';
                        book_info['last_chapter_title'] = ritem.title || '';
                        let rop = {
                            method: "POST",
                            headers: {
                                cookie: qtcookie
                            },
                            body: book_info
                        };
                        let check_book_url = base_url + '/check_book_in_book_shelf,';
                        let checkResponse;
                        
                        try {
                            checkResponse = java.ajax(check_book_url + JSON.stringify(rop));
                        } catch (e) {
                            java.log('检查书籍请求失败:' + e);
                        }
                        
                        if (checkResponse) {
                            let check_data;
                            try {
                                check_data = JSON.parse(checkResponse).data;
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('解析检查响应失败:' + e);
                            }
                            try {
                                if (check_data && check_data.id) {
                                    book_info['id'] = check_data.id;
                                    let uurl = base_url + '/update_book_shelf,';
                                    java.ajax(uurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                } else {
                                    java.ajax(rurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                }
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('书架操作失败:' + e);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    } catch (error) {
        java.log('书籍同步流程异常:' + error);
        java.longToast('\n同步阅读进度失败，但不影响阅读，可以前往登录关闭书架同步功能。');
    }
}
data;
</js>$.data

searchUrl:
<js>
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'server');
let media;
let sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'source');
let disabled_sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'disabled_sources');
if (String(key).startsWith("m:") || String(key).startsWith("m：")) {
    media = "漫画"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("t:") || String(key).startsWith("t：")) {
    media = "听书"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("d:") || String(key).startsWith("d：")) {
    media = "短剧"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("x:") || String(key).startsWith("x：")) {
    media = "小说"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else {
    media = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'media');
}
if (key.includes('@')) {
    var parts = key.split('@');
    key = parts[0];
    sources = parts[1] || sources;
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let op = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
`${base_url}/search?title=${key}&tab=${media}&source=${sources}&page={{page}}&disabled_sources=${disabled_sources},${op}`
</js>

var urlEncode = function (param, key, encode) {  
  if(param==null) return '';  
  var paramStr = '';  
  var t = typeof (param);  
  if (t == 'string' || t == 'number' || t == 'boolean') {  
    paramStr += '&' + key + '=' + ((encode==null||encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);  
  } else {  
    for (var i in param) {  
      var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? '[' + i + ']' : '.' + i);  
      paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);  
    }  
  }  
  return paramStr;  
};

	let headers={'app-version':'51110','platform':'android','reg':'0','AUTHORIZATION':'','application-id':'com.****.reader','net-env':'1','channel':'unknown','qm-params':''}
	sign_key='d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1'

params={'id':{{$.book_id}}, 'imei_ip':'2937357107','teeny_mode':0}

var urlEncode = function (param, key, encode) {  
  if(param==null) return '';  
  var paramStr = '';  
  var t = typeof (param);  
  if (t == 'string' || t == 'number' || t == 'boolean') {  
    paramStr += '&' + key + '=' + ((encode==null||encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);  
  } else {  
    for (var i in param) {  
      var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? '[' + i + ']' : '.' + i);  
      paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);  
    }  
  }  
  return paramStr;  
};

exploreUrl:
<js>
function setArgument(key, value) {
    var open_argument = source.getVariable();
    open_argument = getArguments(open_argument, '') || {};
    open_argument[key] = value;
    var result = JSON.stringify(open_argument);
    source.setVariable(result);
    return result;
}

var open_argument = source.getVariable();
var base_url = getArguments(open_argument, 'server') || '';
var ms = getArguments(open_argument, 'tone_id') || '';
var source_type = getArguments(open_argument, 'source_type') || '男频';
var tab = getArguments(open_argument, 'tab') || '小说';
var sources = getArguments(open_argument, 'sources') || '番茄';


var sdtoken;
try {
    var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
    sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
} catch (e) {
    sdtoken = '';
}

var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
var fqssionid = '';
if (!fqcookie) {
    java.toast('您还未登陆番茄账号，无法同步数据哦！');
} else {
    fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
}
var fqsjurl = base_url + "/bookshelf?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqtjurl = base_url + "/fqrecommend?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;
var fqlsurl = base_url + "/fqhistory?page={{page}}&ssionid=" + fqssionid;

var groupDatas = [];
var infoData = [];

function deviceType() {
    try {
        return !!java.androidId();
    } catch (e) {
        return false;
    }
}

var hasValidCookie = fqcookie.length > 0;

if (hasValidCookie) {
    function groupQuery() {
        try {
            var url = base_url + "/group_name?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
            var res = java.ajax(url);
            var response = JSON.parse(res);

            if (!(response && response.data)) {}

            response.data.forEach(function(group) {
                var keys = Object.keys(group);
                if (keys.length > 0) {
                    var key = keys[0];
                    var value = group[key];
                    if (value && value.length) {
                        var option = {
                            "method": "POST",
                            "body": {
                                "book_ids": value,
                                "page": "{{page}}"
                            }
                        };
                        groupDatas.push({
                            title: key,
                            url: base_url + "/bookshelf," + JSON.stringify(option),
                            style: {
                                layout_flexGrow: 1,
                                layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }
            });

            if (groupDatas.length % 2 !== 0) {
                groupDatas.push({
                    title: "--",
                    url: "",
                    style: {
                        layout_flexGrow: 1,
                        layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                    }
                });
            }
        } catch (e) {
            java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架");
        }
    }

    try {
        java.longToast("正在加载分组数据...");
        var userUrl = base_url + "/fquser?ssionid=" + fqssionid;
        var userRes = java.ajax(userUrl);
        var userData = JSON.parse(userRes);

        var userName = (userData && userData.data && userData.data.name) ? userData.data.name : '未知用户';
        if (!userName.includes('未知用户')) {
            infoData = [{
                title: "番茄个人中心",
                url: fqsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "个性推荐(番茄)",
                url: fqtjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }, {
                title: "历史阅读(番茄)",
                url: fqlsurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }];
        }
        groupQuery();
    } catch (e) {
        java.longToast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏番茄书架");
    }
}

var style_list = [];
try {
    var durl = `${base_url}/discovestyle?source=${sources}&source_type=${source_type}&tab=${tab}`;
    var res = java.ajax(durl);
    var result = JSON.parse(res);
    style_list = result.data || [];
    if (result.msg) {
        java.toast(result.msg);
    }
} catch (e) {
    java.toast("发现样式获取失败");
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let qtop = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
qtop = JSON.stringify(qtop);
let qtsjurl = base_url+'/get_book_shelf,'+qtop
let qtsj = [{
                title: "晴天个人中心",
                url: qtsjurl,
                style: {
                    layout_flexGrow: 1,
                    layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.45
                }
            }]
var finalData = infoData.concat(groupDatas, style_list);
finalData = qtsj.concat(finalData);
JSON.stringify(finalData);
</js>

}

if (key3 == "") {
    java.log("当前服务器未查询到登录状态，尝试查询其他服务器登录状态...");
    let cookieValue;
    for (let h of host) {
        try {
            cookieValue = String(cookie.getCookie(h)) || String(java.getCookie(h));
            key3 = getKey(cookieValue);
        } catch (e) {
            key3 = "";
        }
        if (key) {
            java.log(`已在${h}登录，退出查询，正在转移登录状态到当前服务${base_url}`);
            //java.log(cookieValue)
            removeCookie(h);
            removeCookie(base_url);
            cookie.setCookie(base_url, cookieValue);
            break;
        }
    }
}

if (book.readConfig == null || book.readConfig.useReplaceRule == null) {
    book.setUseReplaceRule(false);
}

let nickname = '账号状态：⚠️ 未登录 | 点击右上角 🔖 登录';
try {
    let opcx = {
        method: "GET",
        headers: {
            cookie: 'qttoken=' + key3 + ';'
        },
    };
    opcx = JSON.stringify(opcx);
    let user_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(base_url + '/get_avatar,' + opcx));
    if (user_info.code == 0) {
        if (user_info.nickname) {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.nickname
        } else {
            nickname = '欢迎回来：' + user_info.email + "(请前往用户后台设置用户名)"
        }
    }
} catch (e) {
    if (key3) {
        nickname = '账号状态：已登录'
    }
};

let loginStatus = nickname;

let lightDivider = "❇️───────❇️───────❇️";
let heavyDivider = "‎\n‎";

let isValid = (value) => String(value).length > 1;
let ctitle = book.durChapterTitle || '未开始';
let info = `
    📡 当前服务：${base_url}
    🔑 ${loginStatus}
    🏷 数据来源：${sources}
    🔄 当前模式：${tab}
    ⚙️ 访问模式：${proxy}
    📖 阅读至：${ctitle}
`;

if (tab == "听书") {
    //let toneId = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "tone_id");
    let toneId = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
    if (toneId == '') {
    	toneId= '4';
    	}
    if (isValid(book_tts)) {
        info += `${lightDivider}
    🎵 音色配置：${toneId}
    ✨ AI音色请点击右上角书籍变量填写相关值，真人听书请重新搜索选择带有主播的书籍
    ${book_tts}
`;
    }
}

let basicInfo = "";
let addBasicInfo = (value, prefix, icon) => {
    if (isValid(value)) basicInfo += `    ${icon} ${prefix} ${value}\n`;
};

addBasicInfo(tags, "书籍分类：", "🌈");
addBasicInfo(role, "书籍主角：", "👑");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");

if (basicInfo) info += `${lightDivider}\n${basicInfo}`;

if (isValid(abstract)) {
    let indentedAbstract = abstract
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
        .join("\n");
    info += `${heavyDivider}
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
} else {
    info += `${heavyDivider}`;
}

if (isValid(copyright_info)) {
    info += `${lightDivider}
    © ${copyright_info}
`;
} else {
    info += `${lightDivider}`;
}

info += `
${heavyDivider}
    💠💠💠 数据更新于 ${new Date().toLocaleString()} 💠💠💠
`;
let jjinfo = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "info");

if (jjinfo != "off") {
    info = String(info)
        .split("\n")
        .map((line) => line.replace(/^ {4}/, ""))
        .join("\n");
} else {
    basicInfo = "";
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_title, "最新章节：", "📚");
    addBasicInfo(last_chapter_update_time, "更新时间：", "⏳");
    addBasicInfo(word_number, "书籍字数：", "📊");
    addBasicInfo(status, "书籍状态：", "🚩");
    addBasicInfo(score, "书籍评分：", "⭐");
    if (isValid(abstract)) {
        let indentedAbstract = abstract
            .split("\n")
            .map((line) => `    ${line}`)
            .join("\n");
        basicInfo += `
    \n‎
    📖 书籍简介：
${indentedAbstract}
`;
    } else {
        basicInfo += `${heavyDivider}`;
    }
    info = `‎\n🏷 数据来源：${sources}\n` + basicInfo;
}
</js>

    variable: varia,
    version: '4.11.5.1'
};

var content_url = '/content';
if ((sources == "番茄" || sources == "七猫" || sources == "塔读") && fqpara && tab == "小说") {
    content_url = '/content?review=1';
}

//var signInfo = generateComplexSignature('POST', content_url, {}, APP_SECRET, params);


//var signedParams = copyObject(params);
//signedParams.timestamp = signInfo.timestamp;
//signedParams.nonce = signInfo.nonce;
//signedParams.sign = signInfo.sign;


var op = {
    method: "POST",
    body: JSON.stringify(params),
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie,
        'Content-Type': 'application/json'
    }
};

op = JSON.stringify(op);
//java.toast(op);
data = java.ajax(base_url + content_url + `,${op}`);
try {
    data = JSON.parse(data);
    if (data.msg) {
        java.toast(data.msg);
    }
} catch (e) {}
content = data.content

if (close_img == 'on') {
	content = removeAllImgTags(content);
	}

if ((sources == "番茄" || sources == "七猫" || sources == "塔读") && fqpara == "on" && tab == "小说") {
    var sdtoken;
    try {
        var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
        sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
    } catch (e) {
        sdtoken = '';
    }
    var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
    var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
    var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
    var fqssionid = '';
    if (!fqcookie) {} else {
        fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
    }
    content = content
        .replace(/ident="/g, 'ident="' + base_url)
        .replace(/book_id=/g, 'book_id=' + book_id + '&ssionid=' + fqssionid);
    if (device_type == "苹果") {
        content = paraForiOS(content, sources);
    } else {
        content = paraForAndroid(content, sources,islyc);
    }
}
data = JSON.stringify({
    content: content,
});
if (device_type == "安卓" && (tab == "短剧" || tab == "视频" || sources == '毒舌影视' || sources == 'NT动漫')) {
    data = {
        content: `【右上角刷新】开启播放(下一集请切换下一章刷新)\n播放直链：\n${content}`,
    };
    data = JSON.stringify(data);
    if (book.durChapterIndex === chapter.index) {
        let video_url = `${base_url}/online_video?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}`;
        if (sources == '毒舌影视' || sources == 'NT动漫') {
            video_url = content;
        };
        java.startBrowser(video_url, title);
        java.toast("正在加载视频...");
    }

}
data;
</js>$.content

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
let res = JSON.parse(java.hexDecodeToString(result));
if (res.method) {
    res = Object.fromEntries(
        res.body
        .replace("source", "sources")
        .split("&")
        .map((query) => query.split("="))
    );
    res.url = "";
}
let book_id = res.book_id;
java.put('book_id', book_id);
let tab = res.tab;
let sources = res.sources;
let url = res.url;
let html = "";
let proxy = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "proxy");
if (url != "" && proxy == "本地") {
    if (sources == '69书吧') {
        let ck69 = String(cookie.getCookie('https://www.69shuba.com'));
        let headers = {
        	 "Referer": url,
            "Cookie": ck69,
            "User-Agent":  java.getWebViewUA()
             };
        let op = JSON.stringify({
            "headers": headers
        });
        html = java.ajax(`${url},${op}`);    
    } else {
        html = java.ajax(url);
    }
    //java.log(html);
    if (html.includes("Just a moment...") && sources == '69书吧') {
        cookie.removeCookie('https://www.69shuba.com');
        java.longToast('需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证');
        html = java.startBrowserAwait(url, "需要真人验证，请进入任意书籍详情页过验证").body();

           java.log(html);
    }
};
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server");
let op = {
    method: "POST",
    body: {
        html: html
    }
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
let varia = String(book.getVariable('custom'));
if (varia == 'null') {
    varia = '';
}
varia = JSON.stringify({
    'custom': varia
});
// varia = java.base64Encode(varia);
//java.log(`${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`);
let data = java.ajax(
    `${base_url}/catalog?book_id=${book_id}&source=${sources}&tab=${tab}&variable=${varia},${op}`
);
let device, device_type;
try {
    device = java.deviceID();
    device_type = "苹果";
} catch (e) {
    try {
        device = java.androidId();
        device_type = "安卓";
    } catch (e) {
        device = "";
        device_type = "安卓";
    }
}

if (tab == "小说") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
} else if (tab == "听书") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 32;
    } else {
        book.type = 1;
    }
} else if (tab == "漫画") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 64;
    } else {
        book.type = 2;
    }
} else if (tab == "短剧") {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 3;
    }
} else {
    if (device_type == "安卓") {
        book.type = 8;
    } else {
        book.type = 0;
    }
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let reading = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "reading");

if (book && book.order != 0 && reading == '1') {
    try {
        if (!data || !book.variable || !base_url || !qtcookie) {
            java.log('缺少必要参数');
        } else {
            let parsedData;
            try {
                parsedData = JSON.parse(data);
            } catch (e) {
                java.log('解析data数据失败:' + e);
            }
            
            if (parsedData && parsedData.data && Array.isArray(parsedData.data) && parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex]) {
                let ritem = parsedData.data[book.durChapterIndex];
                let bookInfoObj;
                try {
                    bookInfoObj = JSON.parse(book.variable);
                } catch (e) {
                    java.log('解析book.variable失败:' + e);
                }
                
                if (bookInfoObj) {
                    let book_info;
                    try {
                        book_info = JSON.parse(bookInfoObj.book_detail || JSON.stringify(bookInfoObj));
                    } catch (e) {
                        java.log('解析book_detail失败:' + e);
                    }
                    
                    if (book_info && typeof book_info === 'object') {
                        let rurl = base_url + '/add_book_to_book_shelf,';
                        book_info['read_status'] = 1;
                        book_info['last_chapter_item_id'] = ritem.item_id || '';
                        book_info['last_chapter_title'] = ritem.title || '';
                        let rop = {
                            method: "POST",
                            headers: {
                                cookie: qtcookie
                            },
                            body: book_info
                        };
                        let check_book_url = base_url + '/check_book_in_book_shelf,';
                        let checkResponse;
                        
                        try {
                            checkResponse = java.ajax(check_book_url + JSON.stringify(rop));
                        } catch (e) {
                            java.log('检查书籍请求失败:' + e);
                        }
                        
                        if (checkResponse) {
                            let check_data;
                            try {
                                check_data = JSON.parse(checkResponse).data;
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('解析检查响应失败:' + e);
                            }
                            try {
                                if (check_data && check_data.id) {
                                    book_info['id'] = check_data.id;
                                    let uurl = base_url + '/update_book_shelf,';
                                    java.ajax(uurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                } else {
                                    java.ajax(rurl + JSON.stringify(rop));
                                }
                            } catch (e) {
                                java.log('书架操作失败:' + e);
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    } catch (error) {
        java.log('书籍同步流程异常:' + error);
        java.longToast('\n同步阅读进度失败，但不影响阅读，可以前往登录关闭书架同步功能。');
    }
}
data;
</js>$.data

    book_id: book_id,
    item_id: item_id,
    title: title,
    sources: sources,
    tab: tab,
    url: url,
};

    content_url = item_id
} else if ((sources == "番茄" || sources == "七猫" || sources == "塔读") && tab == "小说") {
    var base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), "server") || "";
    var sdtoken;
    try {
        var loginInfoMap = source.getLoginInfoMap ? source.getLoginInfoMap() : {};
        sdtoken = String(loginInfoMap['手动填写番茄token(可不填)'] || '');
    } catch (e) {
        sdtoken = '';
    }
    var rawCookie = getFanqieCookie() || sdtoken;
    var match = rawCookie.match(/sessionid=[^;]+/);
    var fqcookie = match ? match[0] : '';
    var fqssionid = '';

        fqssionid = getSessionId(fqcookie)
    }
    let sourcess = sources.replace('svip_', '');

} else {
    content_url = `data:;base64,${qtcontent},{"type":"qingtian3"}`;
}
</js>

searchUrl:
<js>
let base_url = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'server');
let media;
let sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'sources') || getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'source');
let disabled_sources = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'disabled_sources') || '0';
if (String(key).startsWith("m:") || String(key).startsWith("m：")) {
    media = "漫画"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("t:") || String(key).startsWith("t：")) {
    media = "听书"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("d:") || String(key).startsWith("d：")) {
    media = "短剧"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else if (String(key).startsWith("x:") || String(key).startsWith("x：")) {
    media = "小说"
    key = key.slice(2)
} else {
    media = getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'tab') || getArguments(source.getVariable(), 'media');
}
if (key.includes('@')) {
    var parts = key.split('@');
    key = parts[0];
    sources = parts[1] || sources;
}
let qtcookie = cookie.getCookie(base_url);
let op = {
    method: "GET",
    headers: {
        cookie: qtcookie
    },
};
op = JSON.stringify(op);
`${base_url}/search?title=${key}&tab=${media}&source=${sources}&page={{page}}&disabled_sources=${disabled_sources},${op}`
</js>

	let headers={'app-version':'51110','platform':'android','reg':'0','AUTHORIZATION':'','application-id':'com.****.reader','net-env':'1','channel':'unknown','qm-params':''}
	sign_key='d3dGiJc651gSQ8w1'

params={'id':{{$.book_id}}, 'imei_ip':'2937357107','teeny_mode':0}

var urlEncode = function (param, key, encode) {  
  if(param==null) return '';  
  var paramStr = '';  
  var t = typeof (param);  
  if (t == 'string' || t == 'number' || t == 'boolean') {  
    paramStr += '&' + key + '=' + ((encode==null||encode) ? encodeURIComponent(param) : param);  
  } else {  
    for (var i in param) {  
      var k = key == null ? i : key + (param instanceof Array ? '[' + i + ']' : '.' + i);  
      paramStr += urlEncode(param[i], k, encode);  
    }  
  }  
  return paramStr;  
};
paramSign=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(params).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+params[n],'')+sign_key));
headerSign=String(java.md5Encode(Object.keys(headers).sort().reduce((pre,n)=>pre+n+'='+headers[n],'')+sign_key))
params['sign']=paramSign;
headers['sign']=headerSign;
let url = "https://api-bc.wtzw.com/api/v4/book/detail?"+urlEncode(params);
option = {'headers':headers};

<js>
(() => {
	try {
		data = JSON.parse(source.getVariable())
	} catch (err) {
		data = {}
	}
	sessionID = data.sessionID||"";
	if (!sessionID) {
		chars = "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz123456789";
		charsLength = chars.length
		for (i = 0; i < 26; i++) {
			sessionID += chars.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random() * charsLength))
		}
		data.sessionID = sessionID
		source.setVariable(JSON.stringify(data))
	}
	return JSON.stringify({
		"cookie": "PHPSESSID=" + sessionID,
		"User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 13_3_1 like Mac OS X) AppleWebKit/605.1.15 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/13.0.5 Mobile/15E148 Snapchat/10.77.5.59 (like Safari/604.1)"
	})
})()
</js>

<js>
var bes = result.match(/PHA\+[A-Za-z0-9+\/]+={0,2}/g);
if (!bes) {
    var ml = java.webView(null,baseUrl,null);
    java.setContent(ml)
    var txt = java.getString("#txt>p@text");
    java.longToast("正文解密失败，转为webView动态加载。");
} else {
var result = [];
for (var i = 0; i < bes.length; i++) {
    // 遍历数组，使用阅读内置Base64解码方法
    var bsej = java.base64Decode(bes[i]);
    var txtt = String(bsej);
    result.push(txtt);
      }
	var txt = result.join('\n');
}
txt;
</js>

@js:
const list = []
const push = (title, url, size) => list.push({
  title,
  url,
  style: {
  	 layout_flexGrow: 1,
  	 layout_flexBasisPercent: size||0.29
  }
});

const cats = "全部::0
玄幻小说::1
都市小说::2
仙侠小说::3
历史小说::4
科幻小说::5
诸天无限::6
悬疑小说::7
体育小说::8
游戏小说::9
综合其他::10"
const ranks = "总点击榜::allvisit
月点击榜::monthvisit
周点击榜::weekvisit
日点击榜::dayvisit
总推荐榜::allvote
月推荐榜::monthvote
周推荐榜::weekvote
日推荐榜::dayvote
总月票榜::allvipvote
本月票榜::monthvipvote
前月票榜::previpvote
周月票榜::weekvipvote
日月票榜::dayvipvote
总鲜花榜::allflower
月鲜花榜::monthflower
周鲜花榜::weekflower
日鲜花榜::dayflower
总鸡蛋榜::allegg
月鸡蛋榜::monthegg
周鸡蛋榜::weekegg
日鸡蛋榜::dayegg
总销售榜::allsale
月销售榜::monthsale
周销售榜::weeksale
日销售榜::daysale
月勤更榜::monthwords
周勤更榜::weekwords
日勤更榜::daywords
最近更新::lastupdate
最新入库::postdate
最新上架::signtime
收藏榜::goodnum
字数榜::words
编辑推荐::toptime
新书榜::newhot"

push("书库","",1)
cats.split("
").forEach(cat => {
	 let [title, id] = cat.split("::")
	 push(title, `/sort/${id}/{{page}}.html`)
})
push("排行 - 全本","",1)
ranks.split("
").forEach(rank => {
	 let [title, rk] = rank.split("::")
	 push(title, `/modules/article/toplist.php?order=allvisit&fullflag=${rk}&page={{page}}`)
})

JSON.stringify(list)

ruleContent.content:
<js>
let [, aid, cid] = baseUrl.match(/\/books\/(\d+)\/(\d+)\.html/);
let url = `https://www.deqixs.co/scripts/chapter.js.php?aid=${aid}&cid=${cid}&referrer=${baseUrl}`;
let tokenHtml = java.ajax(url);
eval(String(tokenHtml));

let params = {
  aid,
  cid,
  token: chapterToken,
  timestamp,
  nonce
};
let paramStr =	Object.entries(params)
    .map(x=>x.join("=")).join("&");
let headers = {
	 "Referer": baseUrl,
	 "Accept":	"text/plain, */*; q=0.01",
  "X-Requested-With": "XMLHttpRequest"
}
url = "https://www.deqixs.co/modules/article/ajax2.php?"+paramStr+","+JSON.stringify({
	 headers
})

java.ajax(url)
</js>

bookSourceComment:
使用洛雅橙改版阅读Σ最新测试版效果更佳https://github.com/Luoyacheng/legado

原版阅读可配套LOFTER订阅源使用
http://www.yckceo.com/yuedu/rss/json/id/641.json

❗️需登录
◎搜索格式◎
1、搜索用户<关闭精确搜索>
@用户名
2、搜索合集<关闭精确搜索>
#合集
3、搜索粮单
%粮单名<关闭精确搜索>
4、搜索文章，直接搜索

◎一些使用指南◎
仅阅读Σ支持
1、点击作者名查看合集列表，长按作者名查看作者动态。
2、点击详情页◎跳转lofter软件
3、点击正文◎查看评论
4、源变量填写1，开启查看划线评论
5、点击正文章节链接跳转lofter软件【原版阅读也支持】


◎发现规则格式◎
                                    🏷标签
标签名::https://api.lofter.com/oldapi/tagPosts.api?product=lofter-android-7.4.4&method=newTagSearch&offset={{(page-1) *22}}&limit=22&firstpermalink=null&tag=标签名&type=new,{"method": "POST","body":"null"}
📃用户（搜索可以得到)
部分目录章节比较多，加载时间久，出现目录加载失败，请尝试刷新，因为可能是请求失败导致的

\n?){2}/g,"

"); //d('1.0:') x(//g,""); try { // Aes解密 secret = src.match(/=\s*secret\(\s*['"](.+?)['"],[\s]*['"](.+?)['"],[^);]*?/); string = secret[1] code = java.md5Encode(secret[2]); iv = code.substring(0, 16); key = code.substring(16); //java.log(baseUrl + " Aes解密ok：" + code + "\n" + iv + "\n" + key) result = java.createSymmetricCrypto("AES/CBC/PKCS7Padding", key, iv).decryptStr(string); } catch (err) { try { // 乱序恢复 ns = java.base64Decode(src.match(/var ns='(.+?)';/)[1]).split(','); //java.log(baseUrl + "乱序恢复ok") paragraphArr = result.split('

'); result = ""; for (i = 1; i <= paragraphArr.length; i++) { result += paragraphArr[ns[i] - ns[0]] + '

'; } } catch (err) { //java.log(baseUrl + "乱序恢复Aes解密no") } } //初始化图片链接 x(/(]+>[\t ]*[\r\n]?/g, "#$1#"); //初始化字体格式的文字,匹配 x(/(.*?)<\/i>/g, function(str, p1) { //java.log(p1.charCodeAt().toString(16)); //返回16进制，例：p1= 返回格式#e800# return '#' + p1.charCodeAt().toString(16) + '#' }) //d('2.0:') //转换空格 x(/ /g, ' '); //初始化分段准备 x(/[\t  ]{2,2}/g, "　"); //去掉标签里的属性 x(/(\<|<)([^\>]*?)(\s| )[^\>]*(\>|>)/g, "<$2>"); //d('2.1:') //段落换行 x(/\s*(\n|)+\s*(　{2,})?/gi, "\r\n"); //d('3.0:') //去掉不需要的标签 x(/([\r\n　]*\<\/?([A-Za-z]*)?\>[\r\n　]*)/gi, ""); //引号替换 x(/‘/g, "『"); x(/’/g, "』"); x(/“/g, "「"); x(/”/g, "」"); if (/(Undefined|(^\s*$))/.test(result)) { result = "

bookSourceComment:
2026.3.27日更新：
移除解析国外域名，墙太多了
替换稳定国内解析


❤️‍🔥登录必看❤️‍🔥
1.输入邮箱密码后必须点✓保存生效，
否则读取不到输入的账号密码
2.跳转卡顿在设置→其他设置中清除WebView缓存

🔔适配兼容
IOS仅适配:源阅,用心读书

🔥注：阅读请使用最新测试版
1.所有源站每20秒最多12章，把预下载调到0-3之间使用
💯[打赏VIP无请求限制,专属书源]
2.自定义源站示例：番茄小说,七猫小说  多个源站用英文,号分隔
源站名参考 登录URL //书源配置列表 v参数
3.源站带有❇️图标表示只能指定或@搜索

4.搜索模式：
书名@来源 多个来源用英文,号分隔
示例： 
系统@番茄小说，多个源站使用英文,号分隔
书名@类型 返回对应类型所有源站数据，可直接使用@方式搜索或者点击登陆切换模式
示例： 
系统@小说  听书  漫画  短剧等
默认书名排序
指定作者优先：
作者名@作者   作者名@作者,源站
exploreUrl:
<js>
let config = (() => {
    try {
        let cfg = JSON.parse(source.getVariable())[0] || {};
        if (!cfg.host || !cfg.gender) {
            cfg = {gender: "boy", host: getServerHost()};
            source.setVariable(JSON.stringify([cfg]));
            java.toast("配置初始化完成");
        }
        return cfg;
    } catch(e) {
        let cfg = {gender: "boy", host: getServerHost()};
        source.setVariable(JSON.stringify([cfg]));
        return cfg;
    }
})();
    
let rawVariable = source.getVariable();
let 个人中心 = 1;
let obj = (title, url, type) => ({
  title: title,
  url: url,
  style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: type }
});

let sort = [];
let push = (title, url, type) => sort.push(obj(title, url, type));

let currentType = "";
let currentSource = "";
try {
  let vArray = JSON.parse(rawVariable);
  if (vArray.length > 0) {
    let v = vArray[0];
    currentType = v.gender || "";
    currentSource = v.source || "";
  }
} catch(e) {
  currentType = "";
  currentSource = "";
}

const getGenderDisplayName = (gender) => {
  if (gender == "boy") return "男频";
  if (gender == "girl") return "女频";
  return "";
};

const genderDisplay = getGenderDisplayName(currentType);

push(`当前为【${currentSource || "番茄小说"}】${genderDisplay ? `【${genderDisplay}】` : ''}`, "", 1);

if (currentSource == "晋江") {
	   sort.push({
        title: "📝点击签到",
        url: `${getServerHost()}/jj_signin`,
        style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
    });
    
    sort.push({
        title: "📂我的收藏",
        url: `${getServerHost()}/jjbookshelf?token=`,
        style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
    });
}

const excludedSources = ["小说", "听书", "漫画", "视频", "短剧", "音频","番茄小说"];

if (currentSource && !excludedSources.includes(currentSource)) {
  try {
    let apiUrl = `${getServerHost()}/type_api?source=${currentSource}`;
    if (currentType) {
      apiUrl += `&gender=${currentType}`;
    }
    
    let response = JSON.parse(java.ajax(apiUrl));
    
    if (response.data && response.data.found) {
      response.data.found.forEach(item => {
        let finalUrl = "";
        if (item.url) {
          finalUrl = `${getServerHost()}/type_api?source=${currentSource}&page={{page}}&url=${item.url}`;
          if (currentType) {
            finalUrl += `&gender=${currentType}`;
          }
        }
        sort.push({
          title: item.title,
          url: finalUrl,
          style: item.style || { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
        });
      });
    } else {
      push(`【${currentSource}】${genderDisplay ? `【${genderDisplay}】` : ''}暂无数据`, "", 1);
    }
  } catch(e) {
    push(`【${currentSource}】${genderDisplay ? `【${genderDisplay}】` : ''}暂无数据`, "", 1);
  }
  JSON.stringify(sort);
} else {
  let recommendUrl = getServerHost() + "/read_recommend?session=" + getSessionId();
    let guessUrl = getServerHost() + "/read_guess?session=" + getSessionId();
    push('个性推荐', recommendUrl, 0.45);
    push('猜你喜欢', 'https://fanqienovel.com/tab/cai', 0.45);
    push('巅峰榜单', 'https://fanqienovel.com/api/author/misc/top_book_list/v1/?limit=100&offset={{(page-1)*100}}', 0.29);
  push('出版榜单', 'https://fanqienovel.com/api/node/publication/list?page_index={{(page-1)*100}}&page_count=100', 0.29);
  push('爆更榜单', 'https://api-lf.fanqiesdk.com/api/novel/channel/homepage/rank/rank_list/v2/?aid=13&limit=50&offset={{(page-1)*100}}&side_type=15&type=1', 0.29);
  push('黑马榜单', 'https://api-lf.fanqiesdk.com/api/novel/channel/homepage/rank/rank_list/v2/?aid=13&limit=50&offset={{(page-1)*100}}&side_type=13&type=1', 0.29);
  push('热搜榜单', 'https://api-lf.fanqiesdk.com/api/novel/channel/homepage/rank/rank_list/v2/?aid=13&limit=50&offset={{(page-1)*100}}&side_type=12&type=1', 0.29);

  let showCategories = currentType == "girl" ? [0] : [1];
  
  showCategories.forEach(genderCode => {
    let isMale = genderCode == 1;
    let genderLabel = isMale ? "男频" : "女频";
    
    let categories = isMale ? [
      {id: 1141, name: "西方奇幻"},
      {id: 1140, name: "东方仙侠"},
      {id: 8, name: "科幻末世"},
      {id: 261, name: "都市日常"},
      {id: 124, name: "都市修真"},
      {id: 1014, name: "都市高武"},
      {id: 273, name: "历史古代"},
      {id: 27, name: "战神赘婿"},
      {id: 263, name: "都市种田"},
      {id: 258, name: "传统玄幻"},
      {id: 272, name: "历史脑洞"},
      {id: 539, name: "悬疑脑洞"},
      {id: 262, name: "都市脑洞"},
      {id: 257, name: "玄幻脑洞"},
      {id: 751, name: "悬疑灵异"},
      {id: 504, name: "抗战谍战"},
      {id: 746, name: "游戏体育"},
      {id: 718, name: "动漫衍生"},
      {id: 1016, name: "男频衍生"}
    ] : [
      {id: 1139, name: "古风世情"},
      {id: 8, name: "科幻末世"},
      {id: 746, name: "游戏体育"},
      {id: 1015, name: "女频衍生"},
      {id: 248, name: "玄幻言情"},
      {id: 23, name: "种田"},
      {id: 79, name: "年代"},
      {id: 267, name: "现言脑洞"},
      {id: 246, name: "宫斗宅斗"},
      {id: 539, name: "悬疑脑洞"},
      {id: 253, name: "古言脑洞"},
      {id: 24, name: "快穿"},
      {id: 749, name: "青春甜宠"},
      {id: 745, name: "星光璀璨"},
      {id: 747, name: "女频悬疑"},
      {id: 750, name: "职场婚恋"},
      {id: 748, name: "豪门总裁"},
      {id: 1017, name: "民国言情"}
    ];
    
    push(`❤️${genderLabel}阅读榜❤️`, "", 1);
    
    categories.forEach(cat => {
      sort.push({
        title: cat.name,
        url: `${getServerHost()}/style_top?rank_list_type=3&offset={{(page-1)*10}}&limit=10&category_id=${cat.id}&gender=${genderCode}&rankMold=2`,
        style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
      });
    });
    
    push(`❤️${genderLabel}新书榜❤️`, "", 1);
    
    categories.forEach(cat => {
      sort.push({
        title: cat.name,
        url: `${getServerHost()}/style_top?rank_list_type=3&offset={{(page-1)*10}}&limit=10&category_id=${cat.id}&gender=${genderCode}&rankMold=1`,
        style: { layout_flexGrow: 1, layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29 }
      });
    });
  });

  let fqCategoryArr = [];
showCategories = currentType == "girl" ? [0] : [1];

showCategories.forEach(i => {
  try {
    let response = JSON.parse(java.ajax(`${getServerHost()}/type_style?new_category_tab=${i}`));
    let categoryGroups = response.data;
    
    categoryGroups.forEach(group => {
      fqCategoryArr.push(obj(`❤️${group.name}❤️`, null, 1));
      
      group.data.forEach(category => {
        let gender, genre_type;
        if (i == 0) {
          gender = 0;
          genre_type = 0;
        } else if (i == 1) {
          gender = 1;
          genre_type = 0;
        } else {
          gender = 1;
          genre_type = 0;
        }
        
        fqCategoryArr.push({
          title: category.name,
          url: `${getServerHost()}/type_style?category_id=${category.category_id}&genre_type=${genre_type}&gender=${gender}&offset={{(page-1)*100}}&selected_items=`,
          style: {
            layout_flexGrow: 1,
            layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29
          }
        });
      });
    });
  } catch (e) {
    fqCategoryArr.push(obj("分类加载失败，请重试", null, 1));
  }
});

  fqCategoryArr.forEach(item => {
    if (item.style && item.style.layout_flexBasisPercent) {
      push(item.title, item.url, item.style.layout_flexBasisPercent);
    } else {
      sort.push({
        title: item.title,
        url: item.url,
        style: {
          layout_flexGrow: 1,
          layout_flexBasisPercent: 0.29
        }
      });
    }
  });

  let hasValidSession = false;
  let username = "";

  try {
    let uinfo = java.ajax(getServerHost() + "/book_user?session=" + getSessionId());
    uinfo = JSON.parse(uinfo);
    
    if (uinfo.data.name) {
      username = uinfo.data.name;
      hasValidSession = true;
    }
  } catch (e) {
  }

  if (!hasValidSession) {
    java.toast("番茄登录已过期，请重新登录");
  }

  let gro = [];
  let pushGro = (title, url, type) => gro.push(obj(title, url, type));

  let sArr = [];

  if (hasValidSession) {
    try {
      let book_shelf_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(getServerHost() + "/book_shelf?session=" + getSessionId()));

      if (book_shelf_info.code == 0) {
        个人中心 = 1;
        
        let groups_bookids = { "未分组": [] };
        book_shelf_info.data.book_shelf_info.forEach(i => {
          if (!groups_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"]) 
            groups_bookids[i.group_name] = [];
          groups_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"].push(i.book_id);
        });

        Object.keys(groups_bookids).forEach(k => {
          pushGro(k, "https://fanqienovel.com/fqbookshelf/groupName/" + k, 0.4);
        });
        if (Object.keys(groups_bookids).length % 2 != 0) pushGro("占位", "", 0.4);
        
        sArr.push(obj(username + '的个人中心', '', 1));
        sArr.push(obj("我的书架", "https://fanqienovel.com/fqbookshelf", 1));
        sArr = sArr.concat(gro);
        sArr.push(obj("阅读历史", getServerHost() + "/read_history?session=" + getSessionId() + "&page={{page}}", 1));
      } else {
        个人中心 = 0;
        java.toast("获取书架信息失败，登录可能已过期");
      }
    } catch (e) {
      个人中心 = 0;
      java.toast("番茄登录过期，已隐藏个人中心");
    }
  } else {
    个人中心 = 0;
    java.toast("您还未登录番茄账号，无法同步数据");
  }

  sort = sArr.concat(sort);
  JSON.stringify(sort);
}
</js>

let catalog = {
    source: result.source,
    url: result.book_url,
    name: result.title,
    tab: result.tab || "novel"
};

var tabTips = {audio: '听书', video: '视频', comic: '漫画'}; 
if (tabTips[catalog.tab]) {
    java.toast('当前为' + tabTips[catalog.tab] + '模式');
}

yunurl = java.base64Encode(JSON.stringify(catalog));
result = `data:catalogUrl;base64,${yunurl},{"type":"shushan"}`;

ruleExplore.author: $.author
ruleExplore.bookList:
<js>
function getBookIdFull(url) {
    const {java} = this;
    let $ = JSON.parse(url).data;
    let arr = [];
    if ($.book_shelf_info && $.book_shelf_info.length > 0) {
        arr = $.book_shelf_info.map(item => item.book_id);
    } else if ($.data_list && $.data_list.length > 0) {
        arr = $.data_list.map(item => item.book_id_str);
    } else {
        java.toast("获取 book_id 失败，你可能需要登录！");
    }
    return arr;
}

let session = getSessionId()

getShelf = () => {
    let book_shelf_info = java.ajax(getServerHost() + "/book_shelf?session=" + session)
    
    bid = getBookIdFull(book_shelf_info)
    
    let id_list = splitArray(bid, 200)
    let urls = []
    id_list.forEach(i => {
        urls.push(getServerHost() +"/detail?book_id=" + i.join(","))
    })
    res = java.ajaxAll(urls)

    let resp = {book_info: []}
    res.forEach(r => {
        resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
    })

    return resp
}

function getByGroupName(name) {
    let book_shelf_info = JSON.parse(java.ajax(getServerHost() +"/book_shelf?session=" + session))
    
    let group_bookids = {
        "未分组": []
    }
    book_shelf_info.data.book_shelf_info.forEach(i => {
        if (!group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"]) group_bookids[i.group_name] = []
        group_bookids[i.group_name ? i.group_name : "未分组"].push(i.book_id)
    })
    
    if (!group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)]) return {data: []}
    
    let book_ids = splitArray(group_bookids[decodeURIComponent(name)], 200)
    let urls = []

    book_ids.forEach(i => { 	urls.push(getServerHost() +"/detail?book_id=" + i.join(","))
    })
    
    res = java.ajaxAll(urls)

    let resp = {book_info: []}
    res.forEach(r => {
        resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(JSON.parse(r.body()).data)
    })

    return resp
}

function getByTabIndex(index) {
    let url = _mlsec.requestHeader(
        "bookmall/tab",
        "version_name=5.8.9.32",
        null,
        "sessionid=" + session
    )
    let all = JSON.parse(java.ajax(url))
    let tab = all.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[index].cell_data
    if (!tab) tab = []
    let bookList = []
    for (let i of tab) {
        bookList = bookList.concat(i.book_data)
    }
    return { book_info: bookList }
}

function getGuessYouLike() {
    let apiUrl = 'https://reading.snssdk.com/reading/bookapi/bookmall/tab/v/?version_name=5.8.9.32&device_id=1024&device_type=114514&iid=2048&aid=1967&channel=0&os_version=0&app_name=novelapp&version_code=58932&device_platform=android'
    let response = java.ajax(apiUrl + ', ' + JSON.stringify({
        headers: {
            'Cookie': "sessionid=" + session
        }
    }))
    let responseData = JSON.parse(response)
    let finalResult = {
        code: 0,
        message: 'SUCCESS',
        data: {
            cell_view: {
                book_data: []
            }
        }
    }
    if (responseData && responseData.data && responseData.data.tab_item && responseData.data.tab_item.length > 0 && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data.length > 0 && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[0].cell_data && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[0].cell_data.length > 0 && responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[0].cell_data[0].book_data) {
        finalResult.data.cell_view.book_data = responseData.data.tab_item[0].cell_data[0].cell_data[0].book_data
    }
    return finalResult
}

function normalizeResponse(data) {
    if (data.data && data.data.book_list && Array.isArray(data.data.book_list)) {
        return data.data.book_list;
    }
    
    if (data.book_info) return data.book_info;
    if (data.data && data.data.book_info) return data.data.book_info;
    if (data.data && Array.isArray(data.data)) return data.data;
    if (data.list) return data.list;
    if (data.book_list) return data.book_list;
    if (data.data && data.data.publication_list) return data.data.publication_list;
    if (data.result) return data.result;
    if (data.data && data.data.result) return data.data.result;
    if (data.data && data.data.cell_view && data.data.cell_view.book_data) {
        return data.data.cell_view.book_data;
    }
    if (data.data && data.data.records) return data.data.records;
    if (data.data && data.data.list) return data.data.list;
    
    return [];
}

if (baseUrl.includes("type_style")) {
    let sortKey = getSortKey() || '';
    let newUrl = baseUrl + sortKey;
    result = JSON.parse(java.ajax(newUrl));
    
    let normalizedData = normalizeResponse(result);
    JSON.stringify({data: normalizedData});
} else if (baseUrl.endsWith("bookshelf")) {
    result = getShelf("bookshelf/info")
} else if(/read_history/.test(baseUrl)) {
    let pageMatch = baseUrl.match(/page=(\d+)/);
    let page = pageMatch ? pageMatch[1] : '1';
    
    let history_response = java.ajax(getServerHost() + "/read_history?session=" + session + "&page=" + page)
    let history_data = JSON.parse(history_response)
    
    if (history_data.data.data_list) {
        let book_ids = history_data.data.data_list.map(item => item.book_id_str)
        
        let id_list = splitArray(book_ids, 200)
        let urls = []
        id_list.forEach(i => {
          urls.push(getServerHost() +"/detail?book_id=" + i.join(","))
        })
        
        let resp = {book_info: []}
        urls.forEach(url => {
            let detailResponse = java.ajax(url)
            let detailData = JSON.parse(detailResponse)
            if (detailData.data) {
                resp.book_info = resp.book_info.concat(detailData.data)
            }
        })
        
        result = resp
    } else {
        result = {book_info: []}
    }
} else if (baseUrl.includes("style_top")) {
    result = JSON.parse(result);
} else if (baseUrl.includes("/tab/cai")) {
    result = getGuessYouLike();
} else {
    let w = baseUrl.split("/")
    if (baseUrl.includes("groupName")) {
        result = getByGroupName(w[w.length - 1])
    } else if (baseUrl.includes("tab")) {
        result = getByTabIndex(parseInt(w[w.length - 1]))
    } else {
        result = JSON.parse(result)
        if (result.data && result.data.data) {
            result = {book_info: result.data.data}
        }
    }
}

if (!baseUrl.includes("type_style")) {
    let normalizedData = normalizeResponse(result);
    JSON.stringify({data: normalizedData})
}

ruleToc.chapterList:
<js>
let res = JSON.parse(java.hexDecodeToString(result));
let catalog = {source: res.source, url: res.url, name: res.name, tab: res.tab || "novel"};

showTabTips(catalog);

let op = {method: "POST", body: catalog};

let catalogUrl = getServerHost() + `/catalog,${JSON.stringify(op)}`;
let response = java.ajax(catalogUrl);
// java.log(response);

let device = deviceType() ? 'android' : 'ios';

if (device == 'android') {
    var typeMap = {audio:32, comic:64};
    book.type = catalog.tab in typeMap ? typeMap[catalog.tab] : 8;
} else {
    var typeMap = {audio:1, comic:2, video:3};
    book.type = catalog.tab in typeMap ? typeMap[catalog.tab] : 0;
}

JSON.parse(response).data.map((x) => {
    if (x.isVolume == true) {
        x.url = "";
        return x;
    }
    
    x.url = buildChapterUrl(x, catalog, device);
    return x;
});
</js>

        try {
            let cfg = JSON.parse(source.getVariable())[0] || {};
            if (!cfg.host || !cfg.gender) {
                cfg = {gender: "boy", host: getServerHost()};
                source.setVariable(JSON.stringify([cfg]));
                java.toast("配置初始化完成");
            }

            let cfg = {gender: "boy", host: getServerHost()};
            source.setVariable(JSON.stringify([cfg]));
            return cfg;
        }
    })();

    var sourceVal = '';
    var customSource = '';

    try {
        customSource = (source.getLoginInfoMap())['自定义源站'];
    } catch(e) {
        customSource = '';
    }

    if (customSource !== undefined && customSource !== null && String(customSource).trim() !== "") {
        sourceVal = String(customSource).trim();
    } else if (config.source) {
        sourceVal = config.source;
    }

    var param = sourceVal ? '&source=' + encodeURIComponent(sourceVal) : '';

    result = buildSearchResult(key, param, getServerHost());
}
